linkedin_org_description:
Vix Technology is the global leader in intelligent transportation systems, automated fare collection, and transit analytics. With customers in 200 cities around the world, Vix embraces the complexities of modern public transit to create best-in-class fleet management, ticketing and passenger information solutions for transit agencies and operators.

Our systems and devices provide operators with sophisticated operations management, real-time vehicle monitoring and detailed performance reporting to help optimise services. For passengers, we deliver instantaneous, live updates via physical displays, audio outputs, websites, and mobile apps, improving the passenger experience at every point in their journey.

Vix is passionate about connecting people and communities, combining an open, collaborative mindset with cutting-edge technology to make public transport more accessible and more cost effective for all.

title: Waking Night Crisis Support Worker
description_text:
Supporting Young Lives Through Understanding and Care
🟣At Paragon Social Care, we support children and young people through periods of uncertainty, transition, and change. We are seeking Children’s Support Workers who believe in the power of understanding, compassion, and steady care — people who want their work to make a lasting difference.
This role isn’t about routines alone.
It’s about being the calm presence.
The trusted adult.
The person who helps a young life feel safe enough to grow.
💜Who We Are
🟣Our work is guided by a clear vision: Excellence Through Understanding.
Paragon Social Care provides 24/7 wraparound support for children and young people in local authority care, often during the most pivotal moments in their lives. We create environments that are safe, nurturing, and empowering, helping young people build confidence, resilience, and hope for the future.
💜The Role
There is no such thing as a “typical” day — but there is purpose in everyone.
🟣As a Children’s Support Worker, you may:
Offer trauma-informed care to ensure young people are safe and supported.
Build positive, trusting relationships that offer stability
Support daily routines, independence, and life skills
Assist with education, appointments, and meaningful activities
Prepare meals and encourage healthy living
Advocate for young people’s voices and emotional wellbeing
Transport young people to appointments or activities using your own vehicle
Support each child to move forward with confidence and belief in themselves
💜Who We’re Looking For
🟣This role is well-suited to individuals who are:
Compassionate, patient, and emotionally resilient
Experienced in supporting children or young people (paid or voluntary)
Flexible to work varied shifts, including weekends, sleep-ins, and waking nights
Hold a full UK driving licence and have access to a car
Willing to undergo an enhanced DBS check
🟣A relevant qualification (such as NVQ Level 3 in Children’s Residential Care) is desirable but not essential. Full training and ongoing support are provided.
💜What We Offer
We believe that great care starts with well-supported people.
🟣You will receive:
Competitive pay of £17.50 – £28.00 per hour, depending on shift type
Comprehensive training, including 21 online modules and in-person courses covering safeguarding, trauma-informed practice, PACE, and positive behaviour support
Clear career progression pathways into Senior Support Worker roles and beyond
Flexible working patterns
Company pension
Referral bonuses
A supportive, values-driven organisation that invests in your development
💜Why Paragon Social Care
Because understanding changes outcomes.
Because consistency builds trust.
Because children remember who stayed.
If you are looking for a role where your presence truly matters — where care is led by understanding and purpose — we would welcome your application.
Apply today and take the first step towards a career that makes a genuine difference
This post is subject to an enhanced Disclosure and Barring Service (DBS) check due to the nature of the role, which involves working with vulnerable young people. Safeguarding and promoting the welfare of young people is a priority, and all applicants will be expected to share this commitment.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Children's Support Worker provides trauma-informed care, builds trusting relationships, and supports daily routines and life skills for young people. They also advocate for the emotional wellbeing of the children and assist with transportation to appointments.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should be compassionate, patient, and flexible, with experience in supporting children or young people. A full UK driving licence and willingness to undergo an enhanced DBS check are required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Supporting vulnerable and often very challenging children and young people during times of crisis.
linkedin_org_specialties: Social Work and Qualified Social Work
linkedin_org_locations: 3 Claridge Court, Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire HP4 2AF, GB
linkedin_org_description:
At Paragon Social Care, our vision, Excellence Through Understanding, encapsulates our dedication to enhancing the lives of the young people we support. 
Our Mission is one of holistic nurturing and support, providing a safe haven for our young people. Our skilled and caring staff cater to each individual's needs, leveraging our Trauma Informed and Positive Behaviour Support frameworks. Our young people remain the heart of all we do, and their wellbeing and success are our primary focus.
We are steadfast in our belief that empathic, understanding relationships are crucial in catalysing change. Our specialist staff dedicate themselves to acknowledging and validating each young person’s life experiences, laying the foundations for a trust-filled relationship that can truly make a difference.
Our core endeavour is to instill within each young person the values necessary for a flourishing life: 
•	A culture of healthy choices. 
•	Self-confidence and self-worth.
•	Good physical and emotional health.
•	Healthy relationships in all spheres of life.
•	A safe environment to explore and reach their full potential.
Our supportive team offers a safe, nurturing environment that is warm, stimulating, and child centred. We aim to foster an atmosphere that is welcoming, encouraging, aspirational, and consistent, allowing our young people to feel at home and motivated towards their goals.
Our staff group embodies our vision of Excellence Through Understanding. They are the beacon of patience, love, adaptability, diversity, and a holistic approach, forming trusted relationships with the young people we support.
In essence, Paragon Social Care is more than just a support organisation – we are a community driven by a shared vision of understanding and excellence.

title: Software Developer
description_text:
We are partnering with a leading research and innovation organisation to hire a Software Developer to support the development of scalable, high-availability platforms for autonomous manufacturing and advanced planning systems.
This role focuses on building microservices-based applications that enable intelligent production planning, scheduling, and enterprise automation solutions. You will work in a collaborative environment combining applied research and real-world industry implementation.
Key Responsibilities:
Design, develop, test, and maintain enterprise planning and scheduling applications (e.g., production planning, operations scheduling, inventory management). 
Build scalable microservices-based solutions using modern development frameworks. 
Analyse complex planning and scheduling challenges and implement effective software solutions. 
Collaborate with developers, researchers, and cross-functional stakeholders to deliver high-quality software. 
Deploy applications into production environments and provide ongoing maintenance and support. 
Identify performance bottlenecks and optimise application performance and scalability. 
Explore and integrate Generative AI capabilities to enhance planning and scheduling functionalities. 
Document system architecture, technical specifications, and user manuals.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical discipline. 
Experience in software development, ideally within enterprise or complex system environments. 
Strong technical skills in: C# .NET , MS SQL and Angular 
Experience with microservices architecture. 
Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and DevSecOps practices. 
Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills. 
Strong communication skills and ability to work with multiple stakeholders.
Exposure to Generative AI / Agentic AI applications. 
Experience with manufacturing planning, scheduling, inventory, or supply chain systems. 
Knowledge of Siemens APS or similar advanced planning platforms. 
PhD candidates with optimisation (operations research) or machine learning expertise are welcome.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Software Developer will design, develop, test, and maintain enterprise planning and scheduling applications, focusing on building scalable microservices-based solutions. They will collaborate with developers and researchers to deliver high-quality software and optimize application performance.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or a related field, along with experience in software development, particularly in enterprise environments. Strong technical skills in C#, .NET, MS SQL, and Angular are required, along with an understanding of microservices architecture.
linkedin_org_slogan: Talent Acquisition as a Service (TAaaS) - Your Global TA Team On-Demand
linkedin_org_locations: Singapore, SG
linkedin_org_description:
Cygnify is an on-demand, plug & play TA team on a month-to-month subscription, delivering unlimited global hires with no placement fees.

Our Talent Acquisition as a Service (TAaaS) offers companies instant access to a fully managed team of recruitment experts, cutting-edge AI tools, and a 100M+ candidate database. 

All our monthly plans are transparent, and flexible, with no lock-ins, supporting all roles, levels, and locations globally.

Press Play to supercharge your Talent Acquisition—streamlining hiring with a single partner across every location, leveraging our deep market expertise, extensive networks, and proven success in securing top talent.

Avoid the high costs of growing an in-house team and agency placement fees. We have it all in our plug & play TA solution.

title: Brand Ambassador/Full time job
description_text:
H Chapter5, πρωτοπόρος στον τομέα των experiential και digital marketing, αναζητά Brand Ambassadors και Supervisors για να ενισχύσουν τις ομάδες μας σε προωθητικές δραστηριότητες και εκδηλώσεις για αναγνωρίσιμο καπνικό brand.
Οι κατάλληλοι υποψήφιοι θα έχουν την ευκαιρία να εργαστούν σε ένα δυναμικό περιβάλλον, εκπροσωπώντας σημαντικά προϊόντα και συνδέοντας τις μάρκες με τους καταναλωτές. Έχεις πάθος για τις πωλήσεις; Δίνεις αξία σε οτιδήποτε κάνεις; Απολαμβάνεις να επικοινωνείς με καταναλωτές; Οι άνθρωποι σου σε χαρακτηρίζουν ομαδικό παίκτη;
Να η ευκαιρία σου! 
Κύριες αρμοδιότητες:
Συνεχής προώθηση πωλήσεων σε δυνητικούς καταναλωτές μικρής λιανικής. 
Ποιοτική επικοινωνία για τα προϊόντα νέας γενιάς της εταιρίας καπνικών.
Παροχή υψηλού επιπέδου εξυπηρέτησης στους καταναλωτές που επισκέπτονται το σημείο λιανικής πώλησης, με σκοπό την ενίσχυση της εμπειρίας τους, της πιστότητας καθώς και την ικανοποίηση τους.
Υποστήριξη των πωλήσεων & δημιουργία καλών επαγγελματικών σχέσεων με τους συνεργάτες της μικρής λιανικής για την προώθηση των προϊόντων νέας γενιάς.
Δυναμική και ευχάριστη προσωπικότητα, υπευθυνότητα, οργανωτικές ικανότητες και ακεραιότητα.
Επιθυμητή εμπειρία σε ρόλο πωλήσεων και εξυπηρέτησης καταναλωτών.
Εξαιρετικές επικοινωνιακές ικανότητες και κατανόηση των αναγκών των καταναλωτών.
Πνεύμα ομαδικότητας και πάθος για την επίτευξη στόχων.
Αξιοπιστία και υπευθυνότητα.
Επιθυμητό: Πτυχίο ΙΕΚ/ΑΤΕΙ/ΑΕΙ.
Ημέρες απασχόλησης:
5ήμερη απασχόληση: Τρίτη - Σάββατο ή Τετάρτη - Κυριακή
Ωράριο εργασίας: 4 ημέρες 09:00-17:00, 1 ημέρα 14:00-22:00
Τι να περιμένεις από εμάς:
Ελκυστικό πακέτο αποδοχών
Συνεχής εκπαίδευση και ευκαιρίες εξέλιξης
Εταιρικό ΙΧ μικρομεσαίας κατηγορίας 
Εταιρικό Τablet & κινητό
Μηνιαίο bonus επίτευξης στόχων πωλήσεων 
Έξοδα κυλικείου (ημερησίως 3€) 
Αν έχεις τα προσόντα και την επιθυμία να ενταχθείς σε μια κορυφαία εταιρεία, στείλε μας το βιογραφικό σου σήμερα!
ai_core_responsibilities: The Brand Ambassador will promote sales to potential consumers and provide high-level service to enhance consumer experience. They will also support sales and build professional relationships with retail partners.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a passion for sales and excellent communication skills. Experience in sales and customer service is preferred, along with a team-oriented spirit and reliability.
linkedin_org_slogan: BRAND EXPERIENCE AND FIELD MARKETING
linkedin_org_locations: 128 Syngrou Ave., Athens, Athens 11745, GR
linkedin_org_description:
Chapter Five Experiential Marketing Agency

We are in the Brand Experience territory since 2001 offering services such as field promotion, experiential sampling, merchandising, roadshows, mystery shopping, digital.

We aim at creating activities that bring brands close to the consumer with a positive mood; we offer a full package of services from concept and  planning till implementation. 

We offer innovative and drastic solutions that lead to the best possible results.

description_text:
H Chapter5, πρωτοπόρος στον τομέα των experiential και digital marketing, αναζητά Brand Ambassadors και Supervisors για να ενισχύσουν τις ομάδες μας σε προωθητικές δραστηριότητες και εκδηλώσεις για αναγνωρίσιμο καπνικό brand.
Οι κατάλληλοι υποψήφιοι θα έχουν την ευκαιρία να εργαστούν σε ένα δυναμικό περιβάλλον, εκπροσωπώντας σημαντικά προϊόντα και συνδέοντας τις μάρκες με τους καταναλωτές. Έχεις πάθος για τις πωλήσεις; Δίνεις αξία σε οτιδήποτε κάνεις; Απολαμβάνεις να επικοινωνείς με καταναλωτές; Οι άνθρωποι σου σε χαρακτηρίζουν ομαδικό παίκτη;
Να η ευκαιρία σου! 
Κύριες αρμοδιότητες:
Συνεχής προώθηση πωλήσεων σε δυνητικούς καταναλωτές μικρής λιανικής. 
Ποιοτική επικοινωνία για τα προϊόντα νέας γενιάς της εταιρίας καπνικών.
Παροχή υψηλού επιπέδου εξυπηρέτησης στους καταναλωτές που επισκέπτονται το σημείο λιανικής πώλησης, με σκοπό την ενίσχυση της εμπειρίας τους, της πιστότητας καθώς και την ικανοποίηση τους.
Υποστήριξη των πωλήσεων & δημιουργία καλών επαγγελματικών σχέσεων με τους συνεργάτες της μικρής λιανικής για την προώθηση των προϊόντων νέας γενιάς.
Δυναμική και ευχάριστη προσωπικότητα, υπευθυνότητα, οργανωτικές ικανότητες και ακεραιότητα.
Επιθυμητή εμπειρία σε ρόλο πωλήσεων και εξυπηρέτησης καταναλωτών.
Εξαιρετικές επικοινωνιακές ικανότητες και κατανόηση των αναγκών των καταναλωτών.
Πνεύμα ομαδικότητας και πάθος για την επίτευξη στόχων.
Αξιοπιστία και υπευθυνότητα.
Επιθυμητό: Πτυχίο ΙΕΚ/ΑΤΕΙ/ΑΕΙ.
Ημέρες απασχόλησης:
5ήμερη απασχόληση: Τρίτη - Σάββατο ή Τετάρτη - Κυριακή
Ωράριο εργασίας: 4 ημέρες 09:00-17:00, 1 ημέρα 14:00-22:00
Τι να περιμένεις από εμάς:
Ελκυστικό πακέτο αποδοχών
Συνεχής εκπαίδευση και ευκαιρίες εξέλιξης
Εταιρικό ΙΧ μικρομεσαίας κατηγορίας 
Εταιρικό Τablet & κινητό
Μηνιαίο bonus επίτευξης στόχων πωλήσεων 
Έξοδα κυλικείου (ημερησίως 3€) 
Αν έχεις τα προσόντα και την επιθυμία να ενταχθείς σε μια κορυφαία εταιρεία, στείλε μας το βιογραφικό σου σήμερα!
ai_remote_location: Larissa, Thessaly and Central Greece, Greece

ai_core_responsibilities: The Brand Ambassador will promote sales to potential consumers and provide high-level service to enhance their experience. They will also support sales and build professional relationships with retail partners.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a passion for sales and excellent communication skills. Experience in sales and customer service is preferred, along with a team-oriented spirit and reliability.
linkedin_org_slogan: BRAND EXPERIENCE AND FIELD MARKETING
linkedin_org_locations: 128 Syngrou Ave., Athens, Athens 11745, GR
linkedin_org_description:
Chapter Five Experiential Marketing Agency

We are in the Brand Experience territory since 2001 offering services such as field promotion, experiential sampling, merchandising, roadshows, mystery shopping, digital.

We aim at creating activities that bring brands close to the consumer with a positive mood; we offer a full package of services from concept and  planning till implementation. 

We offer innovative and drastic solutions that lead to the best possible results.

title: Waking Night Crisis Support Worker
description_text:
Supporting Young Lives Through Understanding and Care
🟣At Paragon Social Care, we support children and young people through periods of uncertainty, transition, and change. We are seeking Children’s Support Workers who believe in the power of understanding, compassion, and steady care — people who want their work to make a lasting difference.
This role isn’t about routines alone.
It’s about being the calm presence.
The trusted adult.
The person who helps a young life feel safe enough to grow.
💜Who We Are
🟣Our work is guided by a clear vision: Excellence Through Understanding.
Paragon Social Care provides 24/7 wraparound support for children and young people in local authority care, often during the most pivotal moments in their lives. We create environments that are safe, nurturing, and empowering, helping young people build confidence, resilience, and hope for the future.
💜The Role
There is no such thing as a “typical” day — but there is purpose in everyone.
🟣As a Children’s Support Worker, you may:
Offer trauma-informed care to ensure young people are safe and supported.
Build positive, trusting relationships that offer stability
Support daily routines, independence, and life skills
Assist with education, appointments, and meaningful activities
Prepare meals and encourage healthy living
Advocate for young people’s voices and emotional wellbeing
Transport young people to appointments or activities using your own vehicle
Support each child to move forward with confidence and belief in themselves
💜Who We’re Looking For
🟣This role is well-suited to individuals who are:
Compassionate, patient, and emotionally resilient
Experienced in supporting children or young people (paid or voluntary)
Flexible to work varied shifts, including weekends, sleep-ins, and waking nights
Hold a full UK driving licence and have access to a car
Willing to undergo an enhanced DBS check
🟣A relevant qualification (such as NVQ Level 3 in Children’s Residential Care) is desirable but not essential. Full training and ongoing support are provided.
💜What We Offer
We believe that great care starts with well-supported people.
🟣You will receive:
Competitive pay of £17.50 – £28.00 per hour, depending on shift type
Comprehensive training, including 21 online modules and in-person courses covering safeguarding, trauma-informed practice, PACE, and positive behaviour support
Clear career progression pathways into Senior Support Worker roles and beyond
Flexible working patterns
Company pension
Referral bonuses
A supportive, values-driven organisation that invests in your development
💜Why Paragon Social Care
Because understanding changes outcomes.
Because consistency builds trust.
Because children remember who stayed.
If you are looking for a role where your presence truly matters — where care is led by understanding and purpose — we would welcome your application.
Apply today and take the first step towards a career that makes a genuine difference
This post is subject to an enhanced Disclosure and Barring Service (DBS) check due to the nature of the role, which involves working with vulnerable young people. Safeguarding and promoting the welfare of young people is a priority, and all applicants will be expected to share this commitment.
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Children’s Support Worker, you will provide trauma-informed care and build positive relationships to support young people. You will assist with daily routines, education, and advocate for their emotional wellbeing.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should be compassionate, patient, and flexible with experience in supporting children or young people. A full UK driving licence and willingness to undergo an enhanced DBS check are also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Supporting vulnerable and often very challenging children and young people during times of crisis.
linkedin_org_specialties: Social Work and Qualified Social Work
linkedin_org_locations: 3 Claridge Court, Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire HP4 2AF, GB
linkedin_org_description:
At Paragon Social Care, our vision, Excellence Through Understanding, encapsulates our dedication to enhancing the lives of the young people we support. 
Our Mission is one of holistic nurturing and support, providing a safe haven for our young people. Our skilled and caring staff cater to each individual's needs, leveraging our Trauma Informed and Positive Behaviour Support frameworks. Our young people remain the heart of all we do, and their wellbeing and success are our primary focus.
We are steadfast in our belief that empathic, understanding relationships are crucial in catalysing change. Our specialist staff dedicate themselves to acknowledging and validating each young person’s life experiences, laying the foundations for a trust-filled relationship that can truly make a difference.
Our core endeavour is to instill within each young person the values necessary for a flourishing life: 
•	A culture of healthy choices. 
•	Self-confidence and self-worth.
•	Good physical and emotional health.
•	Healthy relationships in all spheres of life.
•	A safe environment to explore and reach their full potential.
Our supportive team offers a safe, nurturing environment that is warm, stimulating, and child centred. We aim to foster an atmosphere that is welcoming, encouraging, aspirational, and consistent, allowing our young people to feel at home and motivated towards their goals.
Our staff group embodies our vision of Excellence Through Understanding. They are the beacon of patience, love, adaptability, diversity, and a holistic approach, forming trusted relationships with the young people we support.
In essence, Paragon Social Care is more than just a support organisation – we are a community driven by a shared vision of understanding and excellence.

title: TTMBC Traffic Management Operative
description_text:
About us:
Pinson TM are working with some of the largest traffic management companies across the UK, and due to an increase in work, we are recruiting for Trainee & Qualified Traffic Management Operatives.
How to register:
Please ensure you have registered with Pinson TM Limited. You can do so on the link here: https://www.pinsontm.co.uk/jobs
What we are looking for:
We are seeking both operatives and drivers with Traffic Management experience. This is a great opportunity to join one of our leading Traffic Management clients.
All Candidates must have experience in one or more of the below positions:
TTMBC Operative 
TTMBC
Scope of Role:
Trainee Operatives & Qualified Operatives will be working with both the direct labour and sub-contract labour, meeting targets and deadlines on time.
Duties may include:
Setting up temporary traffic lights at roads required
Managing the traffic flow at the temp traffic lights ensuring the public abide by this
Reporting anything necessary to site or operations manager
Reliable and dependable with a good attitude to work
Being able to read and interpret CAD traffic management drawings.
Maintaining and remove traffic management within the required time scales.
Setting up traffic lights.
Assisting with the diversion of traffic.
To ensure the team works in a safe and effective manner to achieve optimum output and to the required quality.
Ensure compliance with Health & Safety at Work Act at all times.
Be aware and comply to the provided RAMS.
To help with the unloading/loading of materials.
Ensure safe working practices are followed as outlined in Method Statements and
Risk Assessments.
Reporting plant & vehicle defects.
Skills & Experience
Lantra approved Traffic Management Qualifications
Be able to pass a Drugs & Alcohol Check
Right to Work in UK
Full UK Driving licence (with no more than 6 points)
ai_core_responsibilities: Trainee and qualified operatives will set up and manage temporary traffic lights, ensuring public safety and compliance with regulations. They will also assist with traffic diversion and report any necessary information to site managers.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have experience in traffic management and hold Lantra approved qualifications. A full UK driving license and the ability to pass a drugs and alcohol check are also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Traffic Management Workforce Specialists
linkedin_org_locations: Unit 7, 54-56 Dover Road East, Gravesend , Kent DA11 0RG, GB
linkedin_org_description: At Pinson TM Limited, we believe in making a difference. We are committed to providing professional and reliable traffic management services for your business. Pinson was established with a clear vision in mind: to be the most comprehensive provider of all your traffic management needs. Not only do we provide the best-trained staff in the industry, but we also offer training courses to those looking to better their knowledge and skills. Let us help you navigate the challenges of traffic management, one step at a time.

title: Senior Designer
description_text:
Company Overview:
TheTin is an established brand and technology agency formed in 2001. Based in London, but with a team in other parts of the UK and beyond, we thrive on creativity and technological empowerment, with clients across a variety of sectors, and specialising in the global professional services.
With a strong emphasis on R&D and continuous professional development, TheTin seeks a Senior Designer to enhance its team. TheTin offers flexible remote-first options and an inclusive, forward-thinking workplace.
You will ideally be based within a comfortable commuting distance of London. We are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their ethnicity, gender identity, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation or age.
The Role:
As our business continues to grow, we’re excited to welcome a talented and creative senior brand-led digital designer to our team. This is an opportunity to shape and evolve sophisticated brand and digital systems for an impressive and diverse client portfolio of large, global B2B and professional services organisations.
We’re looking for an ambitious designer with a proven track record in brand-led digital design, supported by strong UI expertise. Experience working with complex, corporate or professional services brands operating at scale is essential, where clarity, consistency, and strategic brand thinking are critical.
You’ll work in a collaborative, ideas-driven environment alongside skilled creatives, developers, strategists, and a lovely team of project managers. Together, we tackle a broad range of projects that will challenge and develop your brand and creative leadership, enabling you to create exceptional work that inspires both clients and colleagues.
As a confident and proactive senior team member, you’ll balance driving your own projects forward with contributing to the team’s collective success. You’ll champion ideas, advocate for your work, and play a vital role in inspiring those around you. This is a highly client-facing role, requiring confidence, clarity, and credibility when engaging senior stakeholders.
If you’re ready to shape the future of digital design we’d love to see what you can bring to the team. Applications close on Friday 20th February. Please note that the earliest start date for this position is 6th April 2026.
Key Responsibilities:
Lead and create inspiring brand-led digital communications, including responsive websites, campaign creative, and brand-focused design solutions that elevate client identity and positioning.
Develop and produce strategically driven, visually compelling user-focused design solutions in collaboration with the strategy team, ensuring all work aligns with client and business objectives.
Collaborate with creatives, strategists, and developers to maintain brand integrity and creative excellence, while addressing technical constraints.
Support, mentor, and inspire more junior designers, fostering a culture of creativity and growth.
Act as a senior creative partner to clients, confidently presenting work, articulating brand and design rationale, and addressing technical considerations with clarity.
Pitch ideas and lead client workshops, showcasing your ability to influence, engage, and align senior stakeholders around creative visions.
Manage multiple projects simultaneously, with strong commercial acumen, to successfully deliver high-quality work on time and within budget.
Contribute to R&D experiments, team insights, and thought leadership through participation in Tinnovation sessions and other agency initiatives.
Confidently defend your design decisions when challenged, demonstrating brand, creative, and strategic thinking to address client and internal feedback.
Stay at the forefront of design trends, tools, and industry standards, providing best practice advice to colleagues and clients.
Actively contribute to team initiatives, including new business development and fostering a culture of collaboration and success.
What We’re Looking For:
Expertise in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, After Effects), Figma, Sketch, and foundational HTML/CSS knowledge.
Proven ability to create strong, cohesive brand identities across digital and print mediums, ideally within large-scale B2B, corporate, or professional services environments.
Strong UI design skills, supported by a solid understanding of UX principles, including user flows, user journeys, typography, and layout design to deliver intuitive and engaging digital experiences.
Experience working in a fast-paced agency environment or in-house with global, complex B2B organisations.
Exceptional attention to detail, ensuring all work meets creative, commercial, and technical standards.
Excellent presentation and communication skills, with the ability to confidently lead client conversations and build trusted relationships.
Proactive and innovative, tackling design challenges with brand-led, strategically considered digital solutions.
What We Offer:
A chance to work with global clients and make significant impacts in the professional services industry.
Opportunities for career advancement in a forward-thinking company.
A creative and supportive work environment where ideas can flourish.
Next steps:
Successful candidates can expect the following interview process:
W/C 2nd March: Initial 30min call with our Senior Operations Manager and a member from our Design Team.
W/C 9th March: A 1-1.5hr portfolio review with a member of our management team and Senior Designer. You will be given at least 3-days notice in preparation for this interview.
W/C 23rd March: A final call with the team.
Starting Salary:
Circa £50-60k dependent on experience.
Please note that the earliest start date for this position is 6th April 2026.
Benefits:
Remote First: We support our staff to work wherever they want in the UK, & after passing probation we support short stints of remote work abroad. 
Share Scheme: We operate a share scheme for all current members of staff that are with us for over a year.
Holiday: 20 days plus a day for every year you work up to 25 days, plus Bank Holidays, and a shutdown in between Christmas and New Year.
Bonus pot: Our staff are eligible to participate in a discretionary bonus scheme based on our annual targets.
Enhanced Parental Leave: Eligible employees on Maternity Leave receive full pay for 12 weeks. For Paternity Leave, we give full pay for 4 weeks.
Note to recruiters: We love what you do, but we have trusted recruitment partners already in place. If you must contact us, do so via info@thetin.net.

title: Waking Night Crisis Support Worker
locations_alt_raw: Letchworth Garden City, England, United Kingdom
locations_derived: Letchworth Garden City, England, United Kingdom
description_text:
Supporting Young Lives Through Understanding and Care
🟣At Paragon Social Care, we support children and young people through periods of uncertainty, transition, and change. We are seeking Children’s Support Workers who believe in the power of understanding, compassion, and steady care — people who want their work to make a lasting difference.
This role isn’t about routines alone.
It’s about being the calm presence.
The trusted adult.
The person who helps a young life feel safe enough to grow.
💜Who We Are
🟣Our work is guided by a clear vision: Excellence Through Understanding.
Paragon Social Care provides 24/7 wraparound support for children and young people in local authority care, often during the most pivotal moments in their lives. We create environments that are safe, nurturing, and empowering, helping young people build confidence, resilience, and hope for the future.
💜The Role
There is no such thing as a “typical” day — but there is purpose in everyone.
🟣As a Children’s Support Worker, you may:
Offer trauma-informed care to ensure young people are safe and supported.
Build positive, trusting relationships that offer stability
Support daily routines, independence, and life skills
Assist with education, appointments, and meaningful activities
Prepare meals and encourage healthy living
Advocate for young people’s voices and emotional wellbeing
Transport young people to appointments or activities using your own vehicle
Support each child to move forward with confidence and belief in themselves
💜Who We’re Looking For
🟣This role is well-suited to individuals who are:
Compassionate, patient, and emotionally resilient
Experienced in supporting children or young people (paid or voluntary)
Flexible to work varied shifts, including weekends, sleep-ins, and waking nights
Hold a full UK driving licence and have access to a car
Willing to undergo an enhanced DBS check
🟣A relevant qualification (such as NVQ Level 3 in Children’s Residential Care) is desirable but not essential. Full training and ongoing support are provided.
💜What We Offer
We believe that great care starts with well-supported people.
🟣You will receive:
Competitive pay of £17.50 – £28.00 per hour, depending on shift type
Comprehensive training, including 21 online modules and in-person courses covering safeguarding, trauma-informed practice, PACE, and positive behaviour support
Clear career progression pathways into Senior Support Worker roles and beyond
Flexible working patterns
Company pension
Referral bonuses
A supportive, values-driven organisation that invests in your development
💜Why Paragon Social Care
Because understanding changes outcomes.
Because consistency builds trust.
Because children remember who stayed.
If you are looking for a role where your presence truly matters — where care is led by understanding and purpose — we would welcome your application.
Apply today and take the first step towards a career that makes a genuine difference.
This post is subject to an enhanced Disclosure and Barring Service (DBS) check due to the nature of the role, which involves working with vulnerable young people. Safeguarding and promoting the welfare of young people is a priority, and all applicants will be expected to share this commitment.
ai_remote_location: Letchworth Garden City, England, United Kingdom
ai_remote_location_derived: Letchworth Garden City, England, United Kingdom
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Children’s Support Worker, you will provide trauma-informed care and build positive relationships with young people. Your role will involve supporting daily routines, assisting with education, and advocating for their emotional wellbeing.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should be compassionate, patient, and flexible to work varied shifts, including waking nights. A full UK driving licence and access to a car are required, and an enhanced DBS check will be conducted.
linkedin_org_slogan: Supporting vulnerable and often very challenging children and young people during times of crisis.
linkedin_org_specialties: Social Work and Qualified Social Work
linkedin_org_locations: 3 Claridge Court, Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire HP4 2AF, GB
linkedin_org_description:
At Paragon Social Care, our vision, Excellence Through Understanding, encapsulates our dedication to enhancing the lives of the young people we support. 
Our Mission is one of holistic nurturing and support, providing a safe haven for our young people. Our skilled and caring staff cater to each individual's needs, leveraging our Trauma Informed and Positive Behaviour Support frameworks. Our young people remain the heart of all we do, and their wellbeing and success are our primary focus.
We are steadfast in our belief that empathic, understanding relationships are crucial in catalysing change. Our specialist staff dedicate themselves to acknowledging and validating each young person’s life experiences, laying the foundations for a trust-filled relationship that can truly make a difference.
Our core endeavour is to instill within each young person the values necessary for a flourishing life: 
•	A culture of healthy choices. 
•	Self-confidence and self-worth.
•	Good physical and emotional health.
•	Healthy relationships in all spheres of life.
•	A safe environment to explore and reach their full potential.
Our supportive team offers a safe, nurturing environment that is warm, stimulating, and child centred. We aim to foster an atmosphere that is welcoming, encouraging, aspirational, and consistent, allowing our young people to feel at home and motivated towards their goals.
Our staff group embodies our vision of Excellence Through Understanding. They are the beacon of patience, love, adaptability, diversity, and a holistic approach, forming trusted relationships with the young people we support.
In essence, Paragon Social Care is more than just a support organisation – we are a community driven by a shared vision of understanding and excellence.

title: Route Sales and Service Representative
description_text:
UniFirst is HIRING - ROUTE COVERAGE SPECIALIST 
Location: HYANNIS, MA
ONE DAY ONLY / In-Person Interviews - TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 17
APPLY NOW to Secure Interview (8 am - 4:30 pm)
$68,809 Annually
Paid Weekly
Full-Time
Mondays - Fridays
NO WEEKENDS
40+ Hours a week (No overnights)
A UniFirst Route Coverage Specialist covers delivery routes for unavailable Route Service Representatives (RSRs), delivering and picking up products, providing customer service, and resolving issues to maintain customer satisfaction and build relationships. The role requires proficiency across multiple routes, accurate record-keeping, vehicle maintenance, safe driving, and effective communication with customers and leadership. Key Responsibilities
Route Coverage: Learn multiple routes to provide seamless service when an RSR is absent.
Product Delivery & Pickup: Safely load, transport, and unload clean garments and other products to customers, while also collecting soiled items.
Customer Service: Deliver high-quality service, resolve customer requests independently, and build strong customer relationships.
Operational Excellence: Accurately manage invoices, conduct inventory audits, and ensure the safety and appearance of the assigned vehicle.
Safety: Adhere to all traffic laws, safety standards, and company policies.
Problem-Solving: Address customer needs and resolve service issues to ensure customer satisfaction and loyalty.
Communication: Effectively communicate customer feedback and potential solutions to location leadership.
Qualifications
Driver's License: A valid driver's license and a clean driving record are required, with a minimum age of 21 years old.
DOT Compliance: Must meet Department of Transportation (DOT) requirements, including a physical exam.
Education: A high school diploma, GED, or military service is required.
Customer Service Skills: Strong customer service abilities and the ability to work independently yet maintain a team-oriented mindset.
Physical Stamina: Must be able to lift, carry, and push up to 50 pounds and stay on their feet for extended periods.
Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using and learning new technologies for operational efficiency.
Job Type: Full-time
Benefits:
Dental insurance
Life insurance
Paid time off
Vision insurance
ai_core_responsibilities: The Route Coverage Specialist covers delivery routes for unavailable Route Service Representatives, ensuring seamless service. Responsibilities include product delivery and pickup, customer service, and operational excellence.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a valid driver's license, a clean driving record, and meet DOT requirements. A high school diploma or equivalent is required, along with strong customer service skills and physical stamina.

linkedin_org_locations: 27651 La Paz Road, Ste 100, Laguna Niguel, CA 92677, US
linkedin_org_description:
HireLive is a National Recruitment Firm specializing in face to face recruiting events!

With over 10 years of experience, our goal is to be our clients lowest cost per hire by being time efficient, having access to both active and passive candidates while having affordable services.

We feel a resume can only tell you a fraction about a candidate, but seeing the candidate in person, shaking their hand and seeing how they communicate and present themself is a much better and a more efficient indicator of knowing how they would represent their employer.

All of our services are built to let a hiring manager see many qualified candidates face to face in a short amount of time. Whether you are a Fortune 100 company, or a smaller local company, we have the program to help with your staffing needs. 

Our services allow companies to interview an abundance of qualified candidates, provide a single source for most positions nationally, and limit the resumes received and interviews to those that are a much closer match to your qualifications.

HireLive is using technology to its advantage. We have a state of the art CRM to help us stay in touch with, tag, search, post and follow candidates across the country. We have relationships with all major job boards to access their databases and post job openings efficiently as a third party objective recruiting firm. We can also help find those passive candidates with our strong hold on the Social Networking industry. This is all offered for a fraction of the cost of traditional recruiting methods, and in a shorter period of time.

title: TTMBC Traffic Management Operative
description_text:
About us:
Pinson TM are working with some of the largest traffic management companies across the UK, and due to an increase in work, we are recruiting for Trainee & Qualified Traffic Management Operatives.
How to register:
Please ensure you have registered with Pinson TM Limited. You can do so on the link here: https://www.pinsontm.co.uk/jobs
What we are looking for:
We are seeking both operatives and drivers with Traffic Management experience. This is a great opportunity to join one of our leading Traffic Management clients.
All Candidates must have experience in one or more of the below positions:
TTMBC Operative 
TTMBC
Scope of Role:
Trainee Operatives & Qualified Operatives will be working with both the direct labour and sub-contract labour, meeting targets and deadlines on time.
Duties may include:
Setting up temporary traffic lights at roads required
Managing the traffic flow at the temp traffic lights ensuring the public abide by this
Reporting anything necessary to site or operations manager
Reliable and dependable with a good attitude to work
Being able to read and interpret CAD traffic management drawings.
Maintaining and remove traffic management within the required time scales.
Setting up traffic lights.
Assisting with the diversion of traffic.
To ensure the team works in a safe and effective manner to achieve optimum output and to the required quality.
Ensure compliance with Health & Safety at Work Act at all times.
Be aware and comply to the provided RAMS.
To help with the unloading/loading of materials.
Ensure safe working practices are followed as outlined in Method Statements and
Risk Assessments.
Reporting plant & vehicle defects.
Skills & Experience
Lantra approved Traffic Management Qualifications
Be able to pass a Drugs & Alcohol Check
Right to Work in UK
Full UK Driving licence (with no more than 6 points)
ai_core_responsibilities: Trainee and qualified operatives will set up and manage temporary traffic lights, ensuring public safety and compliance with regulations. They will also assist with traffic diversion and report any issues to the site or operations manager.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have experience in traffic management and hold Lantra approved qualifications. A full UK driving license and the ability to pass a drugs and alcohol check are also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Traffic Management Workforce Specialists
linkedin_org_locations: Unit 7, 54-56 Dover Road East, Gravesend , Kent DA11 0RG, GB
linkedin_org_description: At Pinson TM Limited, we believe in making a difference. We are committed to providing professional and reliable traffic management services for your business. Pinson was established with a clear vision in mind: to be the most comprehensive provider of all your traffic management needs. Not only do we provide the best-trained staff in the industry, but we also offer training courses to those looking to better their knowledge and skills. Let us help you navigate the challenges of traffic management, one step at a time.

title: Operations Specialist (Travel Industry)
description_text:
We are hiring a skillful and dynamic Operations Specialist to join our operations team and improve our customer experience. 

WHO WE ARE
Greeking.me is a creative travel company based in Athens, offering authentic travel experiences to visitors from all over the world. We design original journeys to Greece & Italy, and our mission is to help travelers create some of their most treasured memories in our homeland. Our company also offers a wide portfolio of unique tours and activities centered around Greece's culture, history, and gastronomy. You can learn more about us, here.

WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR?
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Operations Specialist to join our team, who will be responsible for managing the day-to-day operations of our company and ensuring the smooth running of all travel-related services for our clients.
Responsibilities
Manage and coordinate all aspects of travel operations, including reservations, bookings, itinerary planning, and other related services
Ensure the accuracy and timeliness of travel bookings and customer information
Develop and maintain relationships with vendors and suppliers
Manage and monitor customer inquiries and complaints, and provide prompt and effective solutions
Collaborate with other departments to improve operational processes and procedures
Manage and maintain travel-related databases and systems
Bachelor's degree in hospitality, tourism, or related field
Minimum of 2 years of experience in travel operations or related field
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Proficient in Google Suite for Business
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
Fluent in English and Greek
Competitive salary
Hybrid working model, combining office presence in Athens with the flexibility to work from home several days each week
Lots of room for growth and taking initiatives
Ongoing training and development
Modern office environment 
Be part of a young and dynamic team who values your ideas and personality
ai_core_responsibilities: The Operations Specialist will manage and coordinate all travel operations aspects, including reservations, bookings, and itinerary planning, while ensuring accuracy and timeliness of all travel-related services for clients. This role also involves developing vendor relationships and monitoring customer inquiries and complaints to provide effective solutions.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in hospitality, tourism, or a related field, along with a minimum of two years of experience in travel operations or a similar area. Essential requirements include strong communication, problem-solving, analytical skills, proficiency in Google Suite, and fluency in both English and Greek.
linkedin_org_slogan: Original journeys to Greece & Italy
linkedin_org_locations: 35 Syngrou Avenue, Kallithea, 2nd floor, Athens, Athens 11743, GR
linkedin_org_description:
Greeking.me is a boutique travel agency specializing in crafting bespoke journeys to Greece and Italy, tailored for discerning travelers from across the globe. Since our inception, we've been dedicated to transforming travel dreams into unforgettable adventures, combining cultural immersion, luxury, and unparalleled service.

With expertise in curating private tours, unique experiences, and seamless itineraries, we focus on authentic connections to the destinations we serve. From the iconic landmarks of Greece to the enchanting towns of Italy, every journey is designed with precision, reflecting our clients' preferences, travel styles, and aspirations.

Our team of passionate local experts ensures every detail is handled with care, from accommodations and transportation to exclusive activities. Rated "Excellent" by hundreds of travelers, Greeking.me is more than a travel agency — we are your gateway to exploring Greece and Italy with insider knowledge and a personal touch.

title: Product Designer - UX
description_text:
Megbízónk vezető szerepet tölt be a vállalatirányítási és megfelelőségi szoftverek fejlesztésében, amelyek egyszerűsítik a döntéshozatalt és növelik a szervezeti átláthatóságot. Megoldásaik segítségével a cégek hatékonyan kezelhetik a kockázatokat és biztosíthatják a szabályozásoknak való megfelelést.
Feladatok:
Felhasználóközpontú digitális termékek tervezése az ügyféligények és üzleti célok alapján.
Felhasználói kutatások lebonyolítása: interjúk, usability tesztek és más módszerek alkalmazása a felhasználói igények és viselkedés megértéséhez.
Wireframe-ek, prototípusok és végleges dizájnok készítése, amelyek biztosítják a kiváló felhasználói élményt.
Szoros együttműködés a termékmenedzsmenttel, fejlesztőkkel és más érintett csapatokkal a termék sikeres megvalósítása érdekében.
Az ügyfélút (customer journey) elemzése és optimalizálása a felhasználói élmény folyamatos fejlesztése érdekében.
Felhasználói visszajelzések és analitikák figyelemmel kísérése a tervezési döntések adatvezérelt támogatásához.
A UX trendek és legjobb gyakorlatok követése és alkalmazása, az innováció elősegítése érdekében.
Legalább 5 éves UX design tapasztalat digitális termékek fejlesztésében, preferáltan komplex rendszerek vagy SaaS platformok terén.
Mély ismeretek a felhasználói kutatás, interakciótervezés és vizuális tervezés területén.
Tapasztalat modern tervezőeszközökkel (pl. Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD) és prototípuskészítő eszközökkel.
Erős analitikus és problémamegoldó készségek, képesség az összetett felhasználói igények lefordítására intuitív megoldásokra.
Kiváló kommunikációs készségek, képesség a tervek hatékony prezentálására és a stakeholder-ekkel való együttműködésre.
Agilis környezetben szerzett tapasztalat előnyt jelent.
UX tanúsítványok vagy releváns végzettség előny, de nem feltétel.
Éves szinten 5 plusz szabadnap (contractoroknak nem elérhető).
Részvételi lehetőség szakmai eseményeken, workshopokon és hackathonokon.
Rugalmas munkakörnyezet, munkaidő, amely lehetőséget ad a munka és magánélet egyensúlyának megteremtésére.
Csapatépítő programok, ahol a közösség építése és a kapcsolatok erősítése az elsődleges.
Lehetőség valódi hatást gyakorolni a termékekre és ügyfelekre.
Szakmai fejlődési lehetőségek és innovatív projektekben való részvétel.

title: Back End Software Engineer (.NET)
description_text:
About Signal Ocean: 

Signal Ocean is the technology arm of the Signal Group, a diversified shipping services group with offices in London and Athens. Our main product, The Signal Ocean Platform, allows ship charterers, brokers and owners to securely process, combine and analyse complex arrays of private and public shipping data. Powered by sophisticated machine learning / artificial intelligence technologies, the platform delivers customized, exclusive insights that help our clients achieve performance and efficiency.
About the role
As the Signal Ocean Platform continues to grow, we’re expanding our engineering team. We're looking for a Back-End Engineer with experience in C#, someone who is curious, proactive, and passionate about building high-quality digital solutions. Signal’s Software Engineers work closely with data science, design, product, and business analysis professionals to develop robust solutions for the highly entrepreneurial domain of shipping.
Technology Stack
We build cloud solutions using C#, .NET Core, Typescript, React, MSSQL Server, Azure, Python, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, Grafana and more. We also offer the opportunity to work on complex architectures and technology stacks, as well as a global, Artificial Intelligence-powered technology product vision, supported by the use of multiple AI tools and accelerators. We use Agile to organize our teams and would love to onboard people who can contribute across product discovery, delivery, optimization, QA, DevOps, and Continuous Integration.
Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
2+ years of C# development experience building real-world web applications of medium-to-large scale and complexity, preferably within .NET Core.
Experience with relational and non-relational databases (MSSQL, MongoDB) and ORM frameworks (e.g., Entity Framework, Dapper).
Practical knowledge of cloud environments, ideally Microsoft Azure.
Excellent command of English, both written and spoken.
Positive, collaborative approach to work and a strong sense of ownership and accountability.
Excellent command of written and spoken English (company’s working language).
Familiarity with Agile practices, project management toolchains (e.g. JIRA).
Generous compensation with additional performance incentives.
Coverage under the company’s collective health insurance plan.
Opportunity to work alongside experienced people with deep knowledge in software engineering, data science & shipping business who are always eager to mentor.
Signal’s hybrid work policy currently includes 9 on-site working days per month, during which our happy hour events take place. 
2-4 weeks of onboarding training to prepare you for your new role, having the opportunity to meet about 30 trainers while diving deep into our products and/or the shipping world.
Career growth opportunities and a structured development discussion every 4 months.
Personal learning budget for training, seminars, conferences (750 to 2000 EUR annually depending on seniority).
Regular team bonding events and activities.
Fitness benefits to support your health and wellbeing 
All applications will be considered under the terms and conditions of confidentiality in accordance with the regulations of personal data protection.
We are an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace. At Signal, we believe that diversity of opinions, approaches and viewpoints is key to our innovation and success and we encourage that with our hiring, development and rewards practices. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, sex, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any other protected characteristics by law and take actions to eliminate those from our workplace.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves developing robust solutions for the highly entrepreneurial domain of shipping by working closely with data science, design, product, and business analysis professionals. Engineers are expected to contribute across product discovery, delivery, optimization, QA, DevOps, and Continuous Integration.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have 2+ years of C# development experience building real-world web applications, preferably within .NET Core, and possess practical knowledge of cloud environments like Microsoft Azure. Excellent command of written and spoken English is mandatory, along with a positive, collaborative approach.

title: SSE - Backend
description_text:
VMock, a pioneering company in the accounting industry, is seeking a skilled Software Development Engineer - Backend (SSE) to join our dynamic team. As an SSE, you will play a crucial role in shaping the future of accounting technology by developing robust backend solutions that drive our innovative products. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement scalable, efficient, and secure backend systems that meet the demands of our users and clients. This role requires a deep understanding of backend architecture, APIs, and database management, alongside a commitment to coding excellence and best practices. Your expertise will contribute to solving complex accounting challenges with cutting-edge technology, enabling our clients to enhance their financial operations. At VMock, we value creativity and collaboration, and we are looking for someone who is not only technically proficient but also passionate about making a significant impact in the accounting sector. If you are ready to take your backend development skills to the next level and work in a fast-paced, forward-thinking environment, we want to hear from you!

Responsibilities
Design and develop scalable backend systems for accounting applications.
Implement RESTful APIs to facilitate communication between front-end and back-end components.
Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic.
Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to team members.
Optimize application performance through monitoring and tuning of backend services.
Ensure the security and integrity of data in compliance with industry standards.
Participate in architectural discussions and contribute to technical design decisions.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
Proficient in backend programming languages such as Java, Python, or Node.js.
Experience with database technologies including SQL and NoSQL databases.
Strong understanding of RESTful services and API design principles.
Familiarity with cloud services such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
Knowledge of version control systems like Git and collaborative development practices.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work in a team-oriented environment.
Private Health Insurance
Pension Plan
Paid Time Off
Work From Home
Training & Development
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: Design and develop scalable backend systems for accounting applications while implementing RESTful APIs for communication between components. Collaborate with frontend developers and ensure the security and integrity of data.

title: Junior Specialist Gastroenterology-Private Healthcare Facility
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is excited to announce an opening for a Junior Specialist in Gastroenterology at a reputable private healthcare facility. This position is tailored for aspiring gastroenterologists looking to enhance their clinical skills and gain firsthand experience in a patient-centric environment.
As a Junior Specialist in Gastroenterology, you will play a key role in assisting with the assessment and treatment of patients suffering from various gastrointestinal issues. Working alongside a team of seasoned specialists, you will have the opportunity to learn practical applications of gastroenterological procedures while delivering high-quality care to patients.
Key Responsibilities:
Conduct initial assessments of patients with gastrointestinal complaints and document medical histories.
Assist in the interpretation of diagnostic tests and contribute to develop treatment plans under supervision.
Participate in the performance of endoscopic procedures and other diagnostic interventions as required.
Provide education and support to patients regarding their conditions and treatment options.
Engage in clinical meetings, case discussions, and continuous education opportunities.
Support the gastroenterology team in administrative tasks and coordination of patient care.
Medical degree (MD or DO) with an interest in pursuing a career in Gastroenterology.
Completion of residency training in Internal Medicine or a related specialty.
Basic understanding of gastrointestinal disorders and treatment modalities.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the desire to work collaboratively in a healthcare team.
Proactive attitude towards learning and professional development.
Ability to provide compassionate and empathetic care to patients.
Flexibility to adapt in a fast-paced medical environment.
Benefits are Good Monthly Salary + Incentives + Standard family benefits like accommodation, Air ticket, Medical insurance, and Education allowance.
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Junior Specialist in Gastroenterology, you will assist with the assessment and treatment of patients with gastrointestinal issues. You will conduct initial assessments, assist in diagnostic tests, participate in endoscopic procedures, and provide patient education.

title: Supervisor-Pipelines and Subsea
description_text:
We are? 

We are EnerMech, a specialist service company that delivers safe, integrated solutions for complex energy projects. For over 50 years, we’ve been energizing our clients across the world with unrivaled expertise, equipment, and technology that supports the entire asset life cycle – offshore and on land. We enable progress through our three global business lines: Energy Solutions, Infrastructure & Industrial Solutions, and Lifting Solutions. Within these areas, we offer a wide range of services, including cranes, lifting, fluid power, training, equipment rental, pipeline, subsea, process, and valves – all designed to help you optimize performance, enhance reliability, and improve efficiency. With a focus on operational excellence, we deliver value through our customized integrated solutions. This approach reduces risk and enhances efficiencies making us a leading and trusted partner every step of the way.

Diversity & Inclusion
EnerMech is dedicated to fostering a diverse and inclusive organization. We believe that diversity enriches our team, and we welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, cultures, and identities.
The Role? 
The Pipeline Pre-Commissioning Supervisor is responsible for overseeing and executing all site-level pre-commissioning activities on pipeline systems, including cleaning, gauging, flooding, hydrotesting, drying, nitrogen purging, inerting, and intelligent pigging operations. This role requires extensive hands-on experience with high-capacity nitrogen membrane systems and the coordination of multidisciplinary teams to safely deliver pipeline systems ready for commissioning.
Main Responsibilities & Key Result Areas
Supervise the full suite of pre-commissioning activities, including:
Pipeline flooding, cleaning, and gauging (FCG)
- Hydrostatic testing (HT)
- Dewatering and air drying
- Nitrogen purging/inerting using membrane and liquid nitrogen systems
- Intelligent pigging (ILI) and baseline tool runs
Lead onshore and offshore execution at both launcher and receiver ends
Ensure the proper setup and functional testing of large pre-comm spreads, including chemical
Injection units, hydrotest pumps, filtration skids, nitrogen membranes, air dryers, and compressors.
Enforce pre-commissioning procedures in line with DNVGL-ST-F101 and project-specific specifications.
Direct field technicians in rig-up, pig loading/launch, spread ramp-up, pressure control, and pig receiving operations.
Monitor real-time data on pig speed, pressure, chemical dosing, and water quality to ensure compliance with control points.
Manage safety during high-pressure operations and coordinate Job Safety Analyses (JSAs), toolbox talks, and HSE audits.
Interface with project engineering teams, clients, and third-party inspection teams.
Participate in contingency planning for events such as stuck pigs, pressure anomalies, or spread malfunctions.
8+ years of pipeline pre-commissioning experience, with at least 5 years in a supervisory role
Proven track record running a large-scale nitrogen membrane spread.
Strong technical knowledge of pigging operations, pipeline integrity testing, and seawater chemical treatment.
Experience working with high-integrity clients (e.g., Qatargas, Saipem) and executing work under strict HSE systems.
Behaviors and Personal Qualities
Strong leadership, decision-making, and conflict resolution skills.
Ability to work under pressure and in extreme environments (heat, offshore).
Detail-oriented with a commitment to procedural discipline and safety.
Capable of working rotational shifts (day/night) and across multicultural teams.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Pipeline Pre-Commissioning Supervisor oversees and executes all site-level pre-commissioning activities on pipeline systems. This includes managing the setup and functional testing of pre-commissioning spreads and ensuring compliance with safety and operational procedures.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have over 8 years of pipeline pre-commissioning experience, with at least 5 years in a supervisory role. A strong technical knowledge of pigging operations and experience with high-integrity clients under strict HSE systems is also required.

linkedin_org_description:
EnerMech delivers integrated specialist services that support critical assets across the energy and infrastructure sectors worldwide. With a heritage rooted in the North Sea and more than five decades of experience, our business has evolved into a dynamic, forward-looking organisation operating in over 50 countries.

Through three global business lines—Energy, Infrastructure & Industrial, and Lifting Solutions—we provide full asset lifecycle support, from pre-commissioning through to decommissioning. Our integrated model brings together mechanical, electrical, instrumentation, and lifting capabilities to streamline project delivery, improve safety outcomes, and boost operational efficiency.

What sets us apart is the ability to blend global reach with local execution. By working closely with clients to understand their unique challenges, we deliver customised solutions that mitigate risk, enhance performance, and create long-term value.

EnerMech is powered by a bold, capable team and a culture built on safety, integrity, and continuous improvement. We take pride in energizing the future of energy, growing our global footprint, and delivering outcomes that make a real difference.

title: Performance Analyst - 2nd XI & Academy
description_text:
Job Title: Performance Analyst - 2nd XI and Academy
Reporting to: 1st XI Performance Analyst 
Location: Worcestershire County Cricket Club, New Road, Worcester, WR2 4QQ
Contract term: April to September 2026, 6 month part time casual arrangement
Background:
Worcestershire County Cricket Club is one of the 18 major county cricket clubs which make up the England and Wales Cricket Board. We play to the highest level of professional cricket with a history stretching back over 155 years.
Our vision is to become Worcestershire’s premier destination for live sports, entertainment & hospitality, whilst providing great experiences for everyone who comes to New Road.
We are passionate about our people and strive to make our working environment a welcoming and inclusive one, fuelling ambition with opportunities and support to help our people achieve their personal and professional goals.
Our values of Trust, Inclusiveness, Kindness, Resilience and Togetherness, resonate across everything we do at the Club and define our culture and behaviours.
Purpose of the Role:
Worcestershire County Cricket Club is looking to appoint a 2nd XI & Academy Performance Analyst to join the Performance Analysis Team in the Elite Cricket Department.
The successful candidate will lead on the set up, filming, coding and analysis of all home 2nd XI fixtures, while supporting us deliver our vision of being the premier destination for live sport, entertainment and hospitality in Worcestershire.
Key Duties and Responsibilities:
1. To lead in the filming and coding of all home 2nd XI fixtures, as well as Academy and Tier 2 Women’s games where required.
2. To lead in the setup and maintenance of Worcestershire’s CCC’s video and analytical equipment and various 2nd XI grounds and fixtures, as well as Academy and Tier 2 Women’s games when required 
3. To lead in analytical projects as required for the 2nd XI, Academy and Tier 2 Women’s players and coaching staff. 
4. To provide post-match analysis of all 2nd XI home matches at the request of the coaching staff. 
5. To film and analyse various training sessions and provide feedback to players and coaching staff. 
6. To assist with the filming and coding of 1st XI home matches when required. 
7. To maintain performance related databases to contribute to player selection.
Safeguarding
This role may involve training, supervising, working with and/or being in sole charge of children and young people. The successful applicant will therefore be required to apply for an enhanced disclosure from the Disclosure and Barring Service. A disclosure is an impartial and confidential document that details an individual’s criminal record and where appropriate gives details of those who are banned from working with children. Having a criminal record will not necessarily be a bar to obtaining a position.
Other responsibilities:
We expect our people to demonstrate and promote our values at all times to ensure Worcestershire County Cricket Club’s brand is always held in the highest regard both internally and in public. It is expected that you will:
• Be proactive in promoting inclusiveness across the club and reporting any discrimination that you witness.
• Be committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of children, young people and adults at risk that visit the Club.
• Promote a positive environment that is welcoming, friendly and supportive.
• Foster a culture of togetherness and commit to contributing to a strong team ethic.
• Be passionate about delivering excellent customer service to everyone that comes through our doors.
The nature of our work and the size of our team here at Worcestershire County Cricket Club requires everyone to be flexible, motivated and an excellent team player.
This Job Description is not an exhaustive list of tasks but represents the key duties and responsibilities required by the role. You may be required to take on such reasonable additional or other responsibilities and tasks as we need from time to time.
Knowledge, Skills, and Experience 
Essential:
· Excellent communication and organisational skills
· Good time management
· Excellent IT skills (preferably Microsoft Excel, Microsoft PowerPoint, Windows Moviemaker/ iMovie)
· Extensive knowledge of domestic cricket and international cricket
Desirable:
· Experience setting up cameras to capture live sport at a professional level.
· Experience using PCS Pro
· Experience using Data visualisation tools (Tableau/Power BI, R etc)
· Fully clean driving license and access to a car.
Personal Qualities
· Team Player
· A desire and proactivity to undertake projects. 
· A passion for cricket
· Professional rapport with staff, flexibility/adaptability, and diplomacy
· Ability to work under pressure
Qualifications
· Undergraduate qualification in a sports performance analysis or a relevant sports degree
OR
· Undergraduate qualification in a mathematics or statistics related degree
OR
· Relevant performance analysis experience
You must have the Right to Work in the UK or be able to independently gain this by the start date in April 2026. We are unable to sponsor visa applications for this role.
Hours & Rate of Pay:
This role is for the 2026 Cricket season and is due to start in April 2026.
· Due to the nature of the role, some evening and weekend work will be required.
· This is a casual role, and no guarantee of hours is given. However, it is anticipated that this will be in the region of 20 to 50 days throughout the course of the season.
· The rate of pay for this role will meet national minimum wage.
The closing date for applications is Sunday 22nd February 2026.
Worcestershire County Cricket Club recognises the positive value of diversity, promotes equality and challenges discrimination. We welcome and encourage job applications from people of all backgrounds.
The Club is committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of children and young people and expects all staff and volunteers to share this commitment.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Performance Analyst will lead the filming, coding, and analysis of home 2nd XI fixtures and support the Academy and Tier 2 Women’s games. They will also provide post-match analysis and maintain performance-related databases for player selection.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should possess excellent communication, organizational, and IT skills, along with a strong knowledge of cricket. An undergraduate qualification in sports performance analysis or a related field is required, or relevant performance analysis experience.
linkedin_org_slogan: Official account of Worcestershire County Cricket Club & our iconic New Road venue.
linkedin_org_locations: The County Ground, New Road, Worcester, Worcestershire WR2 4QQ, GB
linkedin_org_description:
Worcestershire County Cricket Club is a proud first-class club with a modern commercial outlook. From our iconic riverside home at New Road, we bring elite men’s and women’s cricket together with year-round hospitality, conferencing and community programmes that make a real difference.

We help brands create partnerships that deliver measurable ROI and meaningful impact, through matchday activations, content, CSR/ESG initiatives and award-winning events. As an employer, we champion inclusion and wellbeing and are recognised locally for our commitment to an accessible, welcoming club culture.

Whether you’re here to watch cricket, host clients, run a conference or partner on purpose-led programmes, we’ll make it easy, and memorable.

What we do
	•	Sponsorships & brand partnerships
	•	Matchday hospitality & premium experiences
	•	Conferences, exhibitions & venue hire (New Road)
	•	Community, schools & pathways programmes
	•	Content, media & business networking

Let’s talk: partnerships, hospitality and venue enquiries via partnerships@wccc.co.uk

title: Senior Core Banking Automation Engineer
description_text:
We are looking for a Senior Core Banking Automation Engineer to support the stability and daily operation of mission-critical core banking platforms. This role focuses on workload automation, batch processing, and end-of-day (EOD) operations across complex mainframe and distributed environments. You will work in a hybrid working model and collaborate closely with IT Operations and Core Systems teams to ensure reliability, performance, and uninterrupted banking services.
Key Responsibilities
Maintain and support mission-critical core banking batch and EOD processes 
Operate and monitor workload automation and job scheduling platforms 
Execute and supervise daily batch cycles across mainframe and distributed systems 
Troubleshoot production incidents and resolve failures during scheduled runs 
Ensure smooth orchestration of cross-platform processes (mainframe, Linux, Windows) 
Manage data transfers, reporting flows, and automated operational tasks 
Support integration between core systems and downstream platforms 
Produce technical documentation for processes, dependencies, and recovery procedures 
Collaborate with development and infrastructure teams to optimize system stability and performance 
Participate in testing, validation, and continuous improvement of automation procedures
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field 
4+ years of experience in core banking systems or similar enterprise environments 
Strong experience with workload automation or job scheduling tools (e.g., OpCon or similar platforms) 
Hands-on experience with batch/EOD processing and production operations 
Experience with mainframe environments such as AS/400 or z/OS 
Knowledge of COBOL or C 
Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills 
Good understanding of system monitoring, incident handling, and operational reliability 
Fluency in English 
You will be a great candidate for us if you
Enjoy working close to production systems and operations 
Are comfortable handling critical nightly processes and time-sensitive tasks 
Think proactively about stability, reliability, and automation 
Communicate clearly with technical and business stakeholders
Why join inventYOU
Work on large-scale core banking platforms 
Be part of highly experienced infrastructure and operations teams 
Contribute to systems that support thousands of daily transactions 
Hybrid working model with long-term stability and growth
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves maintaining and supporting mission-critical core banking batch and end-of-day processes, operating workload automation platforms, and executing daily batch cycles across mainframe and distributed systems.
