title: Senior Textile Merchandiser
description_text:
English version below ⬇️
----

L’équipe Rore Active recherche son/sa prochain(e) Merchandiser Textile Senior.

Rattaché(e) à notre Directeur Général, tu joueras un rôle clé et structurant dans la construction de nos collections d’activewear et piloteras la construction des gammes, de la vision stratégique jusqu’à la performance business.

Tes missions seront les suivantes :

1/ Construction des gammes & architecture de collection

- Définir l’architecture globale des collections (catégories, silhouettes, niveaux de prix, depth & breadth).
- Construire les gammes saisonnières en cohérence avec l’ADN, le positionnement et la vision long terme de Rore Active.
- Équilibrer essentiels, best-sellers et innovations produit.
- Élaborer et faire évoluer les line plans / collection maps.
- Être garant(e) de la cohérence globale de l’offre, du concept à la mise sur le marché.

2/ Analyse marché, data & performance

- Analyser les performances commerciales (ventes, marges, taux d’écoulement, rotations, performances par catégorie).
- Identifier les leviers d’optimisation des collections (réassorts, suppressions, extensions de gamme).
- Transformer les analyses chiffrées et insights consommateurs en recommandations concrètes.
- Réaliser une veille concurrentielle active sur le marché de l’activewear et du sportswear premium.

3/ Pricing & rentabilité

- Construire la stratégie de prix en lien avec le positionnement de la marque.
- Piloter les objectifs de marge par produit et par collection.
- Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes développement produit et sourcing pour optimiser les coûts.
- Trouver le bon équilibre entre performance produit, désirabilité et rentabilité.

4/ Collaboration & pilotage produit

- Travailler main dans la main avec le Design (briefs créatifs, validations de gamme, arbitrages).
- Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes Stylisme, Développement Produit et Marketing.
- Être un véritable point de convergence entre vision créative, contraintes industrielles et objectifs business.
- Participer activement aux temps forts de la vie de la collection (revues de gamme, jalons, lancements).

Notre processus de recrutement :

Au cours de notre processus de recrutement, tu auras l’opportunité de rencontrer plusieurs membres clés de l’équipe, notamment notre :

- Responsable du Recrutement
- Responsable des Ressources Humaines
- Directeur Général

Tu pourras également être invité(e) à travailler sur un cas pratique merchandising afin d’échanger concrètement sur ta vision produit, puis à venir découvrir nos bureaux et rencontrer l’ensemble de l’équipe 🙌

📩 Envoie-nous ton CV accompagné de tes réalisations, nous avons hâte de découvrir ton univers et ta vision produit !

----------

Rore Active is looking for its next Senior Textile Merchandiser.

Reporting directly to our Managing Director, you will play a key and strategic role in shaping our activewear collections and leading range construction, from strategic vision to business performance.

Your responsibilities will include:

1/ Range construction & collection architecture

- Define the overall collection architecture (categories, silhouettes, price levels, depth & breadth).
- Build seasonal ranges in line with Rore Active’s DNA, positioning, and long-term vision.
- Balance core essentials, best-sellers, and product innovations.
- Create and continuously evolve line plans / collection maps.
- Ensure overall consistency of the offer, from concept through go-to-market.

2/ Market analysis, data & performance

- Analyze commercial performance (sales, margins, sell-through, stock turnover, category performance).
- Identify opportunities to optimize collections (replenishment, cancellations, range extensions).
- Translate data analysis and consumer insights into clear, actionable recommendations.
- Conduct ongoing competitive intelligence within the activewear and premium sportswear market.

3/ Pricing & profitability

- Define the pricing strategy in line with the brand’s positioning.
- Drive margin targets by product and by collection.
- Work closely with Product Development and Sourcing teams to optimize costs.
- Find the right balance between product performance, desirability, and profitability.

4/ Collaboration & product leadership

- Work hand in hand with Design teams (creative briefs, range validation, trade-offs).
- Collaborate closely with Design, Product Development, and Marketing teams.
- Act as a true bridge between creative vision, industrial constraints, and business objectives.
- Actively participate in key collection milestones (range reviews, checkpoints, launches).

You could be the next member of our team if:

- You have 6 to 10 years of experience in textile merchandising, ideally in activewear or sportswear.
- You have strong expertise in range building and collection management.
- You possess a deep understanding of textile products (materials, use, performance, fit).
- You are highly comfortable with data and business analysis.
- You are confident in making decisions, prioritizing, and defending a clear product vision.
- You are proactive, structured, curious, and solution-oriented.
- You enjoy working in an entrepreneurial, fast-evolving environment, where not everything is set in stone.
- You are fluent in English, both written and spoken, and ideally, you Speak also French
- You are based in the Alpes-Maritimes (06) or willing to relocate ☀️

Our recruitment process:

During the recruitment process, you will have the opportunity to meet several key members of the team, including our:
- Talent Acquisition Manager
- Head of Human Resources
- Managing Director

You may also be asked to work on a merchandising case study to discuss your product vision in more depth, followed by a visit to our offices to meet the wider team 🙌

📩 Send us your CV along with examples of your work — we can’t wait to discover your world and your product vision!
\n

\n
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Textile Merchandiser will shape activewear collections and lead range construction from strategic vision to business performance. Responsibilities include defining collection architecture, analyzing market performance, and collaborating with design and product teams.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 6 to 10 years of experience in textile merchandising, ideally in activewear or sportswear, with strong expertise in range building and data analysis. A proactive and structured approach is essential, along with fluency in English and ideally French.
linkedin_org_slogan: Deviens la meilleure version de toi-même !
linkedin_org_locations: Nice, FR
Lyon, FR
linkedin_org_description:
Lorsque nous nous sommes rencontrés, une passion nous a vite réunis, le fitness. Etant deux accros à ce sport aussi passionnant qu’addictif, c’est tout naturellement que nous avons commencé à nous entrainer ensembles. Trois ans plus tard, nous sommes en couples et nous allons toujours à deux à la salle, faisons les mêmes séances et les mêmes exercices. Encore plus motivés qu’auparavant, nous avons néanmoins constaté que de nombreux fitgens se découragent rapidement dans ce sport. En effet, beaucoup d’inscrits ne savent pas toujours comment s’entrainer en salle, ne savent pas quoi faire sans matériel ou encore quelle nutrition adopter. Ne voyant pas de résultats, ils finissent souvent par baisser les bras. Recevant de plus en plus de messages de notre communauté nous demandant de partager nos entrainements, il nous est venu l’envie de créer TRAINSWEATEAT.

TRAINSWEATEAT est un site communautaire où nous partageons chaque jour de la semaine notre workout journalier en salle, mais aussi tous les mois de nouvelles vidéos trainings en direct, ainsi que toutes nos recettes préférées !

title: Area Director- Shropshire and North Wales
description_text:
Area Director- Shropshire and North Wales, Home based with extensive travel. 

Here at IVC Evidensia we are continuing to grow our business and invest significantly in the infrastructure that underpins our local teams. 

We have an exciting opportunity for an Area Director to work together with our Regional Director and Area Support Manager in the West Midlands area of England, specifically the Shropshire and North Wales area. If you are a Clinical Director or Senior Vet Surgeon and are looking to move in to an operations role this could be the ideal opportunity for you. Equally if you are are in an operations role, have the ability to influence, the motivation to drive change whilst leading with confidence to ensure success we would like to hear from you. 

About us:

IVC has grown to become the UK’s largest veterinary group. Our spirit of supporting local leadership and clinical freedom requires us to provide multi-faceted support which optimises practice performance and effectiveness. As the key interface between support centre and practices, this role is critical in leading the culture and values that IVC aspires to. From practices that first join IVC, to those that have been with us for years, the Area Director role will be the strategic ‘face of IVC’ and as such must inspire and motivate every person that interacts with them.

About the role:

To drive the delivery of exceptional clinical quality and client care and providing effective strategic operational and commercial direction. Working collaboratively with Central Support teams to motivate, lead, inspire and embed our company values of We Care, We Dare, We Share and consistently demonstrate our company culture to recruit, educate and retain the best clinical talent within the veterinary profession.

What are we looking for?

*At least 5 years leadership experience, with proven coaching and mentoring skills, and a desire to develop our people
*Proven ability to maximise clinical and financial performance of individuals and teams
*A keen understanding of key Financial & Clinical KPI’s without direction, to then identify actions to improve performance across individuals and teams
*Strong people skills (engaging, educating, motivating, inspiring) to ensure you can bring together diverse teams across multiple sites
*A leader who can collaborate with their team and peers, able to lean into High Challenge & High Support
*A trailblazer with a well-developed set of demonstratable emotional intelligence skills, you can recognise who needs what and when
*Vision to lead for the future, someone agile, resilient, dynamic and results driven to deliver excellence
*An influencer who listens well, is authentic & trustworthy whilst not afraid to challenge the status quo
*An exceptional communicator, who can deliver the key strategic vision with a strong emphasis on the ‘why’, as well as the ‘what’
*Remote line leadership ideally within veterinary
*Large scale multi site management 

Key Priorities

*Ambassador of our values and responsible for embedding our company culture.
*Mobilise the UK strategy within an area through facilitating best practice sharing, growing effective communication channels between practices, and supporting with the rollout of VCOs and other initiatives
*Oversee the operational and commercial performance of practices within your Area
*Attraction, retention and engagement of staff across the area
*Work closely with Area Support Manager, demonstrating an aligned approach to Area priorities, performance and improvements.
*Line management of Clinical Directors
*Supporting with our future network planning and growth initiatives by providing strategic information and input as necessary.
*Must hold full and valid driving license.

Because our people matter

We recognise that our people are fundamental to the success of our business. Investing in our people, premises and processes is at the heart of what we do. In addition to a competitive base salary, you will benefit from -

Work-life balance
*26 days annual leave inclusive of bank holidays – pro rata for part time 
Wellbeing
*Private medical insurance
*Enhanced family-friendly policies, including maternity/paternity/adoption/shared parental and surrogacy pay.
*Cycle to Work scheme.
*Initiatives focused on employee wellbeing.
*Non-accidental injury support
Development
*Learning and development opportunities via the IVC Evidensia Academy
Additional
*Pawsome Benefits – reward gateway giving discounts and cashback with 100’s of retailers.
*Pension – 5% Employee/3% Employer
*Discounted staff pet care
*Car allowance of £475 per month or a company car
\n

\n
£65,000 - £80,000 a year
Competitive Salary plus benefits 
\n

title: Enterprise Customer Success Manager, EMEA
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Enterprise Customer Success Manager, EMEA in Spain.
This role offers a unique opportunity to shape and scale customer success across a high-growth, AI-driven technology environment. As a founding member of the EMEA customer success team, you will own the full enterprise customer lifecycle, from onboarding to renewal and expansion. You will act as a trusted advisor to technical and executive stakeholders, ensuring customers maximize value and achieve their business goals. Working in a fully remote and collaborative environment, you will combine technical fluency, strategic thinking, and relationship-building to drive long-term partnerships. Your impact will directly influence customer satisfaction, retention, and revenue growth. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced settings and is passionate about innovation, customer advocacy, and operational excellence.
\n

Accountabilities:
Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with enterprise customers, proactively understanding their goals, challenges, and success criteria.
Own the full customer journey, including onboarding, adoption, renewals, and expansion, ensuring consistent value realization.
Drive engagement and product adoption through strategic success plans, enablement sessions, and regular business reviews.
Act as the primary customer advocate internally, influencing product direction and championing customer needs across teams.
Serve as a product expert, educating customers on best practices and guiding them to maximize platform value.
Manage customer communications, ensuring clarity, professionalism, and alignment across stakeholders.
Identify growth opportunities and partner with sales and leadership teams to support account expansion and retention.
Requirements:
5+ years of experience in customer success, account management, or enterprise relationship management.
Strong technical aptitude and ability to engage confidently with software engineers, technical leaders, and executive stakeholders.
Proven experience managing renewals, negotiations, and procurement processes.
Excellent communication skills with full professional fluency in written and spoken English.
Strong understanding of customer success methodologies and sales frameworks such as MEDDPICC, SPICED, or similar.
Familiarity with modern software development practices, version control systems, and developer tools.
Ability to build trust at C-level and across technical teams, driving long-term strategic partnerships.
Willingness to travel up to 25% to meet with customers and attend key events.
Benefits:
Fully remote work environment with location flexibility across EMEA.
Competitive salary package with equity participation.
Comprehensive benefits and professional development opportunities.
Collaborative, innovative, and high-growth company culture.
Exposure to cutting-edge AI and developer-focused technologies.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

title: Client Care Advisor
description_text:
Looking for a new opportunity?

We are currently looking for a Client Care Advisor with a can do attitude, a passion for a high standard of pet care and client service to join our team based at both our busy main hospital and branch surgeries. 
This is a varied role in a busy environment. The ideal candidate will enjoy working with the public providing excellent client care and be used to working in a busy reception environment. The candidate should have an understanding of finance and IT skills and be able to pick up new tasks quickly with a flexible approach. The ability to multi-task and work as a team is a must. 

What does the role involve?

The main duties include answering calls and emails from clients, checking clients in for appointments and processing payments. General admin tasks including scanning and creating invoices. 

Our Client Care Team are our main link between clients and the rest of the team so the candidate should be confident working both individually and part of a team. 

About the rota

This is a full-time permanent role working 40 hours over 4 weekdays per week. Shifts fall between 8:00am and 7:00pm. Weekend day shifts are on a rota basis. Shifts involve both Dunfermline hospital and branch shifts. 

About us

We are a Veterinary Group with branch surgeries around Fife, Kinross and Edinburgh, with our main hospital based in Dunfermline, Fife. We have a great team and provide the highest level of veterinary services to clients and their pets. 

In addition to a competitive salary, you will benefit from:
*6.6 Weeks annual leave 
*Additional annual leave for your birthday which will be added to your holiday allowance
*Enhanced family-friendly policies, including maternity/ paternity/ adoption/ shared parental and surrogacy pay 
*Cycle to work scheme 
*Initiatives focused on employee wellbeing 
*Non-accidental injury support

*Pension scheme 
*Discounted staff pet care

title: Driver / Data Collector in Bad Salzungen, Germany
description_text:
Unternehmensbeschreibung
Die Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) ist ein Unternehmen für Felddatenerhebung, das 2017 in Europa gegründet wurde. Wir erfassen Daten dort, wo Automatisierung nicht möglich ist. Wir zählen Merkmale, machen Fotos und Videos, zeichnen Sprache auf und scannen Gebiete bis ins kleinste Detail – damit Sie fundiertere Entscheidungen treffen können. Unsere Teams zur Datenerhebung sind in Europa und Nordamerika im Einsatz und bereit, sich neuen Herausforderungen zu stellen.

Projektübersicht
Ziel dieses Projekts ist es, hochwertige visuelle Aufnahmen von Straßen, wichtigen Sehenswürdigkeiten und öffentlichen Bereichen in verschiedenen EU-Ländern zu erfassen. Mithilfe von Fahrzeugen, die mit abnehmbaren 360°-Kameras und Lidar-Systemen ausgestattet sind, nehmen die Fahrer umfassende Bilder ihrer Umgebung auf. Die erfassten Daten werden auf bordeigenen Computern (SSD-Laufwerken) gespeichert und später zur Verbesserung einer der führenden Online-Kartenplattformen verwendet.

Die Datensammler folgen vorgegebenen Routen, die sich auf öffentliche Straßen, Geschäftsviertel und Sehenswürdigkeiten konzentrieren. Um die bestmögliche Bildqualität zu gewährleisten, müssen bestimmte Bereiche möglicherweise bei günstigen Wetterbedingungen erneut besucht werden.
Die Projektdauer variiert je nach Umfang der Datenerhebung im jeweiligen Zielgebiet. In der Regel umfasst der Einsatz eine aktive Arbeitsphase von 3 bis 6 Monaten.

Arbeitszeit:
Vollzeitbeschäftigung innerhalb der regulären Geschäftszeiten (8:00–19:00 Uhr).

Ablauf des Bewerbungsverfahrens:
Fahrprüfung zur Verkehrssicherheit, Interview mit einem Recruiter sowie anschließender Onboarding-Prozess.
\n

Ideale/r Kandidat/in:
Gültiger EU-Führerschein
Einwandfreier Leumund (polizeiliches Führungszeugnis und Fahreignungsnachweis)
Mindestens 5 Jahre Fahrpraxis
Berufserfahrung als Fahrer (z. B. Taxi, Kurier, Logistik)
Gute Englischkenntnisse und Beherrschung der Landessprache
Technisch versiert, Erfahrung mit GSuite (Gmail, Google Tabellen, Google Formulare)
Grundkenntnisse in Fahrzeugmechanik
Verantwortungsbewusst, zuverlässig und professionell
Reiselust und Freude am Entdecken neuer Orte
Gute Ortskenntnisse im Einsatzgebiet

Wir bieten:
Ein abwechslungsreiches und spannendes Projekt – mehr als nur Fahren
Wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung
Umfassende Schulung (praktisch und theoretisch)
Laufende Unterstützung durch erfahrene Projektleiter
Arbeit in einem internationalen Team und Umfeld

\n
Wenn Sie Interesse haben, bewerben Sie sich jetzt und gestalten Sie mit uns die Zukunft der Datenerhebung!

They will follow predetermined routes and may need to revisit areas under favorable weather conditions to ensure optimal image quality.

title: Manager of Engineering Ops and Analytics
description_text:
Outsight’s software solutions track the motion of people and vehicles using 3D LiDAR data. Operators of transportation hubs like airports and train stations but also sport venues, road infrastructures and industrial sites can now access accurate and anonymous Spatial Intelligence data, in order to improve operations and increase user safety and satisfaction.

Our international team of scientists and engineers drive the development of our solutions from Paris, San Francisco, Sophia-Antipolis (Nice) & Hong Kong. To support our global outreach, we also operate a commercial office in Spain. You can find below an interesting link about who we are and what we do:Insights about 

OutsightOur Passenger Flow Traffic Monitoring solution is trusted by the world’s leading airports and train stations across 4 continents. Additionally, our Car Traffic Remote Monitoring product is trusted by several Tier 1 customers, including BMW.

Context

We're looking for a Manager of Engineering Ops and Analytics to lead a transformative chapter in our organisation. This is a leadership role that sits at the intersection of DevOps, Data & BI, and Cloud Financial Management — reporting directly to the VP Engineering.

Responsibilities

You will own three strategic pillars:

DevOps Transformation — Supervise and guide our DevOps function through a transition toward a cloud-first, managed-services architecture, improving reliability, scalability, and developer velocity around infra-as-code strategies.

Data & Analytics Foundation — Build from the ground up a data warehouse and Business Intelligence ecosystem to deliver product analytics, engineering performance metrics, and adoption insights that drive decision-making across our department and the company.

FinOps Practice — Design and implement a FinOps strategy to bring visibility, accountability, and optimisation to our cloud spend.

This is a hands-on leadership position ideal for someone who thrives in high-impact, cross-functional environments and wants to shape how a growing tech company operates and scales.

Looking back on your first 12 months

By the end of your first year, you will have:

Took over the automated provisioning strategy and infra-as-code implementation for our cloud-first transition.

Stood up a production-grade data warehouse (e.g., Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift) integrated with a BI layer (e.g., Looker, Power BI); delivered initial dashboards for product usage, engineering velocity, and adoption KPIs.

Implemented cloud cost visibility across teams; introduced tagging standards, budgeting processes, and first optimisation initiatives with measurable savings.Built or reorganised a small, high-performing team; established rituals, documentation 


Requirements for the roles

Leadership & Strategy

Proven experience leading or part of DevOps / Platform / SRE teams through significant infrastructure evolutions.

Track record of building or scaling a data warehouse and BI function — from architecture decisions to stakeholder adoption.

Ability to translate business objectives into technical roadmaps and communicate effectively with both engineering and executive audiences.

Technical Expertise

Deep familiarity with major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and managed services (Kubernetes, serverless, PaaS offerings).

Solid understanding of data engineering fundamentals: ETL/ELT pipelines, dimensional modelling, modern data stack tooling (Python, DBT, orchestration tools).

Working knowledge of FinOps principles: cost allocation, showback/chargeback, reserved instances, rightsizing, and continuous optimisation.

Mindset

Pragmatic problem-solver comfortable operating in ambiguity.

Strong ownership mentality — you see gaps and fill them.

Collaborative leader who elevates others and builds trust across departments.


Nice to have (but not required):

Experience with Infrastructure-as-Code at scale (Terraform and cloud managed services like Terraform Cloud, ScalR.io; Pulumi, CloudFormation).

Hands-on background with observability stacks (Datadog, Honeycomb, Grafana, OpenTelemetry).

Familiarity with product analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel) and how they complement a BI layer.

Prior exposure to FinOps tooling (CloudHealth, Apptio, nOps, native cloud cost explorers).

Experience in a B2B SaaS or product-led growth environment.


Why join us?

Be part of the team pioneering Spatial Intelligence solutions at unprecedented scale—the breakthrough technology transforming how the world’s most prestigious airports, infrastructure operators, and smart cities understand and optimize physical flows.

As a 7-time Gartner-recognized category-defining leader with dozens of global awards including “Edge AI Product of the Year,” “LiDAR Leader Award,” “CES Best of Innovation” and many more, we’re backed by 37 patents and deployments with the most prestigious (and challenging) customers across four continents.

Join our international team of world-class experienced engineers and business leaders solving humanity’s most complex spatial challenges, from passenger flow optimization to autonomous robotics coordination, while working at the cutting edge of 3D AI, LiDAR perception, and real-time analytics.

Supported by rock-solid investors including BNP Paribas, BPI France, Energy Innovation Capital and Demeter who back our long-term vision, this is your opportunity to shape how physical and digital worlds interact, with the resources, growth trajectory, and technical challenges that will accelerate your career in ways traditional companies cannot offer.

Outsight is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer that pursues and hires a diverse workforce. Outsighters don't make employment decisions on the basis of race, color, religion, ethnic or national origin, nationality, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, age, military status, or any other basis protected by local, state, or federal laws. Outsight also strives for a healthy and safe workplace, and prohibits harassment of any kind. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know.
\n

\n

ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have proven experience in leading DevOps teams and building data warehouses. A strong technical background in cloud platforms and data engineering fundamentals is essential.

Operators of transportation hubs like airports and train stations but also sport venues, road infrastructures and industrial sites can now access accurate and anonymous Spatial Intelligence data, in order to improve operations and increase user safety and satisfaction.

Our international team of scientists and engineers drive the development of our solutions from Paris, San Francisco, and Sophia-Antipolis (Nice). To support our global outreach, we also operate commercial offices in the UK, Belgium, Spain, Hong Kong, and Singapore.

We believe that accelerating the adoption of LiDAR technology through robust and scalable software solutions will significantly contribute to making the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

title: Driver / Data Collector in Torres Vedras , Portugal
description_text:
Company description

Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges.


Project Overview

This project aims to collect high-quality visuals of streets, key points of interest, and public spaces across EU countries. Using vehicles equipped with removable 360° cameras and lidars, drivers will capture comprehensive images of the surroundings. The captured data will be stored on onboard computers (SSD Drives) and later utilized to enhance one of the world’s leading online mapping platforms.

Data collectors will follow pre-assigned routes, focusing on public streets, commercial areas, and points of interest. To ensure the highest image quality, certain areas may need to be revisited during favorable weather conditions. 
The duration of the project varies based on the scope of work required in each targeted data collection area. On average, the assignments involve 3 to 6 months of active work.

Work schedule: full time engagement within standard business hours (8 AM - 7 PM).

The recruitment process for the position of a Driver involves such steps: safety driving test, interview with recruiter, and onboarding process.
\n

Ideal Candidate:
Holds a valid EU-issued driver’s license.
Maintains a clean background check (criminal and driving record).
Has at least 5 years of driving experience.
Possesses professional driving experience (e.g., taxi, delivery, logistics).
Proficient in English and the local language.
Tech-savvy, with experience using GSuite tools (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms).
Basic knowledge of vehicle mechanics.
Demonstrates responsibility, reliability, and professionalism.
Enjoys traveling and exploring new places.
Familiar with the area of operations.

What We Offer:
A dynamic and engaging project that goes beyond just driving.
Competitive salary.
Comprehensive training covering both practical and theoretical aspects of data collection.
Ongoing support from experienced managers.
The opportunity to work in an international team and environment.

\n
If you’re interested, apply now and join us in shaping the future of data collection!

title: Driver / Data Collector in Salamanca, Spain
description_text:
Descripción de la empresa

Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) es una empresa de recopilación de datos de campo fundada en 2017 en Europa. Recopilamos datos allí donde la automatización no es posible. Contamos elementos, tomamos fotografías, grabamos vídeos, registramos voz y escaneamos áreas para captar cada detalle que necesitas para tomar decisiones más informadas. Nuestros equipos de recopilación de datos de campo están distribuidos por Europa y Norteamérica y están listos para asumir nuevos desafíos.

Descripción del proyecto

Este proyecto tiene como objetivo recopilar material visual de alta calidad de calles, puntos clave de interés y espacios públicos en países de la UE. Utilizando vehículos equipados con cámaras 360° desmontables y sensores LiDAR, los conductores capturarán imágenes completas del entorno. Los datos recopilados se almacenarán en ordenadores a bordo (unidades SSD) y posteriormente se utilizarán para mejorar una de las principales plataformas de mapas en línea del mundo.

Los recolectores de datos seguirán rutas previamente asignadas, centrándose en calles públicas, zonas comerciales y puntos de interés. Para garantizar la máxima calidad de imagen, algunas áreas podrán requerir visitas adicionales durante condiciones meteorológicas favorables. La duración del proyecto varía según el alcance del trabajo requerido en cada área de recopilación de datos. En promedio, las asignaciones implican entre 3 y 6 meses de trabajo activo.

Horario de trabajo: dedicación a tiempo completo dentro del horario laboral estándar (de 8:00 a 19:00).

El proceso de selección para el puesto de conductor incluye las siguientes etapas: prueba de conducción segura, entrevista con el/la reclutador/a y proceso de incorporación (onboarding).
\n

Candidato/a ideal:
Posee una licencia de conducir válida emitida en la UE.
Cuenta con antecedentes limpios (tanto penales como de conducción).
Tiene al menos 5 años de experiencia conduciendo.
Dispone de experiencia profesional en conducción (por ejemplo, taxi, reparto, logística).
Tiene dominio del inglés y del idioma local.
Posee afinidad con la tecnología y experiencia en el uso de herramientas de GSuite (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms).
Cuenta con conocimientos básicos de mecánica de vehículos.
Demuestra responsabilidad, fiabilidad y profesionalismo.
Disfruta viajar y explorar nuevos lugares.
Está familiarizado/a con la zona de operaciones.

Qué ofrecemos:
Un proyecto dinámico y atractivo que va más allá de solo conducir.
Salario competitivo.
Formación integral que abarca tanto los aspectos prácticos como teóricos de la recopilación de datos.
Apoyo continuo por parte de gestores con experiencia.
La oportunidad de trabajar en un equipo y entorno internacional.

\n
Si te interesa, postúlate ahora y únete a nosotros para dar forma al futuro de la recopilación de datos.

title: Driver / Data Collector in Salamanca, Spain
description_text:
Company description

Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges.


Project Overview

This project aims to collect high-quality visuals of streets, key points of interest, and public spaces across EU countries. Using vehicles equipped with removable 360° cameras and lidars, drivers will capture comprehensive images of the surroundings. The captured data will be stored on onboard computers (SSD Drives) and later utilized to enhance one of the world’s leading online mapping platforms.

Data collectors will follow pre-assigned routes, focusing on public streets, commercial areas, and points of interest. To ensure the highest image quality, certain areas may need to be revisited during favorable weather conditions. 
The duration of the project varies based on the scope of work required in each targeted data collection area. On average, the assignments involve 3 to 6 months of active work.

Work schedule: full time engagement within standard business hours (8 AM - 7 PM).

The recruitment process for the position of a Driver involves such steps: safety driving test, interview with recruiter, and onboarding process.
\n

Ideal Candidate:
Holds a valid EU-issued driver’s license.
Maintains a clean background check (criminal and driving record).
Has at least 5 years of driving experience.
Possesses professional driving experience (e.g., taxi, delivery, logistics).
Proficient in English and the local language.
Tech-savvy, with experience using GSuite tools (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms).
Basic knowledge of vehicle mechanics.
Demonstrates responsibility, reliability, and professionalism.
Enjoys traveling and exploring new places.
Familiar with the area of operations.

What We Offer:
A dynamic and engaging project that goes beyond just driving.
Competitive salary.
Comprehensive training covering both practical and theoretical aspects of data collection.
Ongoing support from experienced managers.
The opportunity to work in an international team and environment.

\n
If you’re interested, apply now and join us in shaping the future of data collection!

title: Driver / Data Collector in Mühlhausen, Germany
description_text:
Unternehmensbeschreibung
Die Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) ist ein Unternehmen für Felddatenerhebung, das 2017 in Europa gegründet wurde. Wir erfassen Daten dort, wo Automatisierung nicht möglich ist. Wir zählen Merkmale, machen Fotos und Videos, zeichnen Sprache auf und scannen Gebiete bis ins kleinste Detail – damit Sie fundiertere Entscheidungen treffen können. Unsere Teams zur Datenerhebung sind in Europa und Nordamerika im Einsatz und bereit, sich neuen Herausforderungen zu stellen.

Projektübersicht
Ziel dieses Projekts ist es, hochwertige visuelle Aufnahmen von Straßen, wichtigen Sehenswürdigkeiten und öffentlichen Bereichen in verschiedenen EU-Ländern zu erfassen. Mithilfe von Fahrzeugen, die mit abnehmbaren 360°-Kameras und Lidar-Systemen ausgestattet sind, nehmen die Fahrer umfassende Bilder ihrer Umgebung auf. Die erfassten Daten werden auf bordeigenen Computern (SSD-Laufwerken) gespeichert und später zur Verbesserung einer der führenden Online-Kartenplattformen verwendet.

Die Datensammler folgen vorgegebenen Routen, die sich auf öffentliche Straßen, Geschäftsviertel und Sehenswürdigkeiten konzentrieren. Um die bestmögliche Bildqualität zu gewährleisten, müssen bestimmte Bereiche möglicherweise bei günstigen Wetterbedingungen erneut besucht werden.
Die Projektdauer variiert je nach Umfang der Datenerhebung im jeweiligen Zielgebiet. In der Regel umfasst der Einsatz eine aktive Arbeitsphase von 3 bis 6 Monaten.

Arbeitszeit:
Vollzeitbeschäftigung innerhalb der regulären Geschäftszeiten (8:00–19:00 Uhr).

Ablauf des Bewerbungsverfahrens:
Fahrprüfung zur Verkehrssicherheit, Interview mit einem Recruiter sowie anschließender Onboarding-Prozess.
\n

Ideale/r Kandidat/in:
Gültiger EU-Führerschein
Einwandfreier Leumund (polizeiliches Führungszeugnis und Fahreignungsnachweis)
Mindestens 5 Jahre Fahrpraxis
Berufserfahrung als Fahrer (z. B. Taxi, Kurier, Logistik)
Gute Englischkenntnisse und Beherrschung der Landessprache
Technisch versiert, Erfahrung mit GSuite (Gmail, Google Tabellen, Google Formulare)
Grundkenntnisse in Fahrzeugmechanik
Verantwortungsbewusst, zuverlässig und professionell
Reiselust und Freude am Entdecken neuer Orte
Gute Ortskenntnisse im Einsatzgebiet

Wir bieten:
Ein abwechslungsreiches und spannendes Projekt – mehr als nur Fahren
Wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung
Umfassende Schulung (praktisch und theoretisch)
Laufende Unterstützung durch erfahrene Projektleiter
Arbeit in einem internationalen Team und Umfeld

\n
Wenn Sie Interesse haben, bewerben Sie sich jetzt und gestalten Sie mit uns die Zukunft der Datenerhebung!
ai_core_responsibilities: Drivers will capture high-quality visual recordings of streets, landmarks, and public areas using vehicles equipped with 360° cameras and Lidar systems. They will follow predetermined routes and may need to revisit areas for optimal image quality.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a valid EU driver's license and a clean background check, along with at least five years of driving experience. Technical proficiency, good English skills, and local area knowledge are also required.

title: Business Development & Channel Executive (DACH)
description_text:
At Promethean...

We're on a mission to transform the way people learn and collaborate around the world. For over 25 years, we've been empowering educators, innovators, and business leaders with our award-winning interactive displays and software solutions that transform learning and workspaces into connected, creative environments.

Our company is rooted in our values, igniting a culture that fosters collaboration and innovation, as well as promoting an inclusive environment. As a global leader in edtech, we are also passionate about four key areas where we can make a difference: growing access to technology for underserved communities, encouraging our employees to take an active role in improving our world, promoting diversity and inclusion, and reducing our carbon footprint. Discover more about our corporate social responsibility initiatives.

As a member of #TeamPromethean, you'll have the opportunity to change lives with technology and directly impact education and the workplace for countless people every day. If you're passionate about education, collaboration, and making a positive global impact, we want to hear from you. Join us on our mission to transform the world, one student, one teacher, and one community at a time.

Als Business Development & Channel Executive sind Sie verantwortlich für die Nachfragegenerierung nach Promethean-Lösungen innerhalb eines definierten Vertriebsgebiets.
Ihr Fokus liegt auf dem Aufbau starker Beziehungen zu Endkunden und Reseller-Partnern – hauptsächlich im Bildungssektor – sowie auf der Unterstützung von Geschäftsmöglichkeiten in weiteren öffentlichen und privaten Marktsegmenten.
Sie agieren als vertrauenswürdiger kaufmännischer Repräsentant von Promethean und arbeiten eng mit Partnern und internen Teams zusammen, um ein nachhaltiges Pipeline-Wachstum im deutschsprachigen Markt zu erzielen.
Hauptfokus: Business Development und Demand Generation
Sekundärer Fokus: Partner Enablement und Channel-Zusammenarbeit
Markt: Deutschsprachige Region (DACH)
Grundgehalt: €58.000 – €79.860 + provisionsberechtigt
\n

Aufgaben:
Recherche und Analyse des zugewiesenen Gebiets zur Identifikation potenzieller Endkunden mit Kaufinteresse an interaktiven Flat Panel Displays (IFPD) und verwandten Lösungen
Proaktive Generierung von Verkaufschancen durch Präsentation und Positionierung des Promethean-Wertversprechens
Vereinbarung und Durchführung von Kundenterminen und Präsentationen – vor Ort und virtuell
Aufbau und Pflege starker Beziehungen zu Schulen, Schulverbünden sowie regionalen Bildungsbehörden, einschließlich Ministerien und öffentlicher Institutionen sowie weitere Kontaktaufbau im Corporate Bereich
Die Tätigkeit ist nach Erfordernis remote im Home-Office, bei Kunden und Messen oder im Büro in Essen auszuführen
Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Reseller-Partnern zur Unterstützung von Produktdemonstrationen, Kundenterminen und Opportunity-Entwicklung
Befähigung von Partnern durch Produkteinführungen und gemeinsame Kundenaktivitäten
Zusammenarbeit mit internen Vertriebs-, Marketing- und Support-Teams zur erfolgreichen Umsetzung und Implementierung von Lösungen
Durchführung hochwertiger Präsentationen für Kunden und Partner
Teilnahme an Messen, Events und Demonstrationen zur Steigerung der Bekanntheit der Promethean-Produkte und -Services
Unterstützung von After-Sales-Orientierungssitzungen bei größeren Projekten zur Sicherstellung einer erfolgreichen Einführung und Identifikation von Folgegeschäft
Aufbau und Pflege wichtiger Kontakte innerhalb von Bildungseinrichtungen und relevanter Markt-Influencer, ebenso im Corporate Bereich
Erreichung und Übertreffen von Umsatzzielen bei gleichzeitiger Sicherstellung von Deckungsbeiträgen und hoher Kundenzufriedenheit

Anforderungen:
Nachgewiesene Erfahrung im Business Development, Vertrieb oder in Channel-orientierten Rollen
Starke soziale Kompetenz und ausgeprägte Kundenorientierung
Hervorragende Präsentations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten
Erfahrung oder starkes Interesse am Bildungs-, AV- oder Public-Sector-Markt
Hohe Eigenmotivation, gute Organisation und Fähigkeit zum selbstständigen Arbeiten
Fähigkeit, technische Produkte und Lösungen schnell zu erlernen und überzeugend zu positionieren
Grundlegendes technisches Verständnis von Hardware- und Softwarelösungen
Erfahrung mit Promethean-Produkten oder vergleichbaren Bildungs- bzw. AV-Lösungen von Vorteil – umfassende Produktschulung wird angeboten

Was wir bieten:
30 Tage bezahlter Jahresurlaub (über dem gesetzlichen Minimum)
Ein zusätzlicher bezahlter freier Tag im Geburtstagsmonat
Ein bezahlter Multicultural Day zur Feier eines religiösen oder kulturellen Feiertags Ihrer Wahl
2 bezahlte Volunteer-Tage pro Jahr
€40 monatliche vermögenswirksame Leistungen zur freien Investition in einen Spar- oder Investmentplan
Bis zu 6 Wochen zusätzliche bezahlte Elternzeit für nicht-gebärende Eltern oder gesetzliche Erziehungsberechtigte (100 % Gehalt in Kombination mit gesetzlichem Elterngeld)
Employee Assistance Program (EAP) mit vertraulicher, professioneller Unterstützung für Sie und Ihre Familie
Zugang zu professioneller Unterstützung rund um die Uhr – telefonisch, per Video oder persönlich
Globales Reward- & Recognition-Programm, das es Führungskräften ermöglicht, herausragende Leistungen mit flexiblen, individuellen Prämien zu würdigen

\n
Base Range: €58,000 - €79,860 + Commission Eligible

Promethean is honored to be an equal opportunity workplace. We realize that by creating teams rich in diverse thoughts and experiences, our people, company and customers are free to thrive. title: Driver / Data Collector in Hannover, Germany
description_text:
Company description

Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges.


Project Overview

This project aims to collect high-quality visuals of streets, key points of interest, and public spaces across EU countries. Using vehicles equipped with removable 360° cameras and lidars, drivers will capture comprehensive images of the surroundings. The captured data will be stored on onboard computers (SSD Drives) and later utilized to enhance one of the world’s leading online mapping platforms.

Data collectors will follow pre-assigned routes, focusing on public streets, commercial areas, and points of interest. To ensure the highest image quality, certain areas may need to be revisited during favorable weather conditions. 
The duration of the project varies based on the scope of work required in each targeted data collection area. On average, the assignments involve 3 to 6 months of active work.

Work schedule: full time engagement within standard business hours (8 AM - 7 PM).

The recruitment process for the position of a Driver involves such steps: safety driving test, interview with recruiter, and onboarding process.
\n

Ideal Candidate:
Holds a valid EU-issued driver’s license.
Maintains a clean background check (criminal and driving record).
Has at least 5 years of driving experience.
Possesses professional driving experience (e.g., taxi, delivery, logistics).
Proficient in English and the local language.
Tech-savvy, with experience using GSuite tools (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms).
Basic knowledge of vehicle mechanics.
Demonstrates responsibility, reliability, and professionalism.
Enjoys traveling and exploring new places.
Familiar with the area of operations.

What We Offer:
A dynamic and engaging project that goes beyond just driving.
Competitive salary.
Comprehensive training covering both practical and theoretical aspects of data collection.
Ongoing support from experienced managers.
The opportunity to work in an international team and environment.

\n
If you’re interested, apply now and join us in shaping the future of data collection!
ai_core_responsibilities: Drivers will capture high-quality visuals of streets and public spaces using vehicles equipped with 360° cameras and lidars. They will follow pre-assigned routes and may need to revisit areas for optimal image quality.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must hold a valid EU driver's license and have at least 5 years of driving experience, preferably in a professional capacity. They should also be tech-savvy and proficient in English and the local language.

TSMG is your expert data collection partner with a presence across Europe and North America. 

Our mission is to empower tech companies with seamless data collection, fueled by our relentless pursuit of excellence.

 • We handle complex data collecting projects.

 • Our team supports Fortune 500 companies with all aspects of data collecting projects – from recruiting to logistics and beyond.

 • We gather vast volumes of relevant, accurate, and diverse datasets to fuel the intelligence of your AI systems.

title: Driver / Data Collector in Münster, Germany
description_text:
Unternehmensbeschreibung
Die Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) ist ein Unternehmen für Felddatenerhebung, das 2017 in Europa gegründet wurde. Wir erfassen Daten dort, wo Automatisierung nicht möglich ist. Wir zählen Merkmale, machen Fotos und Videos, zeichnen Sprache auf und scannen Gebiete bis ins kleinste Detail – damit Sie fundiertere Entscheidungen treffen können. Unsere Teams zur Datenerhebung sind in Europa und Nordamerika im Einsatz und bereit, sich neuen Herausforderungen zu stellen.

Projektübersicht
Ziel dieses Projekts ist es, hochwertige visuelle Aufnahmen von Straßen, wichtigen Sehenswürdigkeiten und öffentlichen Bereichen in verschiedenen EU-Ländern zu erfassen. Mithilfe von Fahrzeugen, die mit abnehmbaren 360°-Kameras und Lidar-Systemen ausgestattet sind, nehmen die Fahrer umfassende Bilder ihrer Umgebung auf. Die erfassten Daten werden auf bordeigenen Computern (SSD-Laufwerken) gespeichert und später zur Verbesserung einer der führenden Online-Kartenplattformen verwendet.

Die Datensammler folgen vorgegebenen Routen, die sich auf öffentliche Straßen, Geschäftsviertel und Sehenswürdigkeiten konzentrieren. Um die bestmögliche Bildqualität zu gewährleisten, müssen bestimmte Bereiche möglicherweise bei günstigen Wetterbedingungen erneut besucht werden.
Die Projektdauer variiert je nach Umfang der Datenerhebung im jeweiligen Zielgebiet. In der Regel umfasst der Einsatz eine aktive Arbeitsphase von 3 bis 6 Monaten.

Arbeitszeit:
Vollzeitbeschäftigung innerhalb der regulären Geschäftszeiten (8:00–19:00 Uhr).

Ablauf des Bewerbungsverfahrens:
Fahrprüfung zur Verkehrssicherheit, Interview mit einem Recruiter sowie anschließender Onboarding-Prozess.
\n

Ideale/r Kandidat/in:
Gültiger EU-Führerschein
Einwandfreier Leumund (polizeiliches Führungszeugnis und Fahreignungsnachweis)
Mindestens 5 Jahre Fahrpraxis
Berufserfahrung als Fahrer (z. B. Taxi, Kurier, Logistik)
Gute Englischkenntnisse und Beherrschung der Landessprache
Technisch versiert, Erfahrung mit GSuite (Gmail, Google Tabellen, Google Formulare)
Grundkenntnisse in Fahrzeugmechanik
Verantwortungsbewusst, zuverlässig und professionell
Reiselust und Freude am Entdecken neuer Orte
Gute Ortskenntnisse im Einsatzgebiet

Wir bieten:
Ein abwechslungsreiches und spannendes Projekt – mehr als nur Fahren
Wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung
Umfassende Schulung (praktisch und theoretisch)
Laufende Unterstützung durch erfahrene Projektleiter
Arbeit in einem internationalen Team und Umfeld

\n
Wenn Sie Interesse haben, bewerben Sie sich jetzt und gestalten Sie mit uns die Zukunft der Datenerhebung!
ai_core_responsibilities: The driver/data collector will capture high-quality visual recordings of streets, landmarks, and public areas using vehicles equipped with 360° cameras and Lidar systems. They will follow predetermined routes and may need to revisit areas under favorable weather conditions to ensure optimal image quality.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a valid EU driving license, a clean criminal record, and at least five years of driving experience. Additionally, they should have good English skills, technical proficiency, and a basic understanding of vehicle mechanics.

title: Conducteur / Collecteur de données à Grenoble, France
description_text:
Description de l'entreprise 
Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) est une entreprise spécialisée dans la collecte de données sur le terrain, fondée en 2017 en Europe. Nous collectons des données là où l’automatisation est impossible. Nous comptons les caractéristiques, prenons des photos, réalisons des vidéos, enregistrons des voix et scannons des zones pour vous fournir tous les détails nécessaires à une prise de décision éclairée. Nos équipes de collecte de données sur le terrain sont réparties à travers l’Europe et l’Amérique du Nord, prêtes à accepter de nouveaux défis. 

Objectif du projet
L'objectif du projet est de collecter des images de haute qualité de rues, de points d’intérêt clés et d’espaces publics dans tous les pays de l’UE. À l’aide de véhicules équipés de caméras amovibles à 360° et de lidars, les conducteurs captureront des images complètes des environs. Les données collectées seront stockées sur des ordinateurs de bord (disques SSD) et utilisées plus tard pour améliorer l'une des cartes en ligne les plus populaires au monde.
Les collecteurs de données suivent des itinéraires prédéfinis, en se concentrant sur les rues publiques, les zones commerciales et les points d’intérêt. Pour assurer la meilleure qualité d’image, certaines zones devront être revisitées lors de conditions météorologiques favorables.
La durée du projet varie en fonction de l’étendue des travaux requis dans chaque zone ciblé de collecte de données. En moyenne, les missions impliquent de 3 à 6 mois de travail actif.

Horaire de travail: engagement à temps plein dans les heures normales d’ouverture (de 8 h - à 19 h)
Le processus de recrutement pour le poste de conducteur comprend les étapes suivantes : un test de conduite sécuritaire, un entretien avec un recruteur et un processus d’intégration.
\n

Candidat idéal:
Possède un permis de conduire valide délivré dans l’UE.
Dispose d’un casier judiciaire et d’un dossier de conduite vierges.
Justifie d’au moins 5 ans d’expérience de conduite.
Possède une expérience professionnelle en conduite (p. ex.: taxi, livraison, logistique)
Maîtrise l’anglais et la langue locale.
À l’aise avec les outils technologiques, notamment la suite GSuite (Gmail, Google Sheets, Google Forms).
Connaissances de base en mécanique automobile.
Fait preuve de responsabilité, de fiabilité et de professionnalisme.
Apprécie les voyages et la découverte de nouveaux endroits.
Connaît bien la région d’opérations.

Nous offrons:
Un projet dynamique et engageant qui va bien au-delà de la simple conduite.
Un salaire compétitif.
Une formation complète couvrant les aspects pratiques et théoriques de la collecte de données.
Un soutien continu de la part de managers expérimentés.
La possibilité de travailler dans une équipe et un environnement international.

\n
ai_core_responsibilities: The primary responsibility is to collect high-quality images and data from public streets and points of interest using equipped vehicles. Collectors will follow predefined routes and may need to revisit areas under favorable weather conditions.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a valid EU driving license and have a clean criminal and driving record. A minimum of 5 years of driving experience and familiarity with technology tools are also required.

title: Driver / Data Collector in Lagos, Portugal
description_text:
Company description

Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges.


Project Overview

This project aims to collect high-quality visuals of streets, key points of interest, and public spaces across EU countries. Using vehicles equipped with removable 360° cameras and lidars, drivers will capture comprehensive images of the surroundings. The captured data will be stored on onboard computers (SSD Drives) and later utilized to enhance one of the world’s leading online mapping platforms.

Data collectors will follow pre-assigned routes, focusing on public streets, commercial areas, and points of interest. To ensure the highest image quality, certain areas may need to be revisited during favorable weather conditions. 
The duration of the project varies based on the scope of work required in each targeted data collection area. On average, the assignments involve 3 to 6 months of active work.

Work schedule: full time engagement within standard business hours (8 AM - 7 PM).

The recruitment process for the position of a Driver involves such steps: safety driving test, interview with recruiter, and onboarding process.
\n

Ideal Candidate:
Holds a valid EU-issued driver’s license.
Maintains a clean background check (criminal and driving record).
Has at least 5 years of driving experience.
Possesses professional driving experience (e.g., taxi, delivery, logistics).
Proficient in English and the local language.
Tech-savvy, with experience using GSuite tools (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms).
Basic knowledge of vehicle mechanics.
Demonstrates responsibility, reliability, and professionalism.
Enjoys traveling and exploring new places.
Familiar with the area of operations.

What We Offer:
A dynamic and engaging project that goes beyond just driving.
Competitive salary.
Comprehensive training covering both practical and theoretical aspects of data collection.
Ongoing support from experienced managers.
The opportunity to work in an international team and environment.

\n
If you’re interested, apply now and join us in shaping the future of data collection!

ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must hold a valid EU-issued driver’s license and have at least 5 years of driving experience, preferably in professional settings. They should also be proficient in English and the local language, and possess basic knowledge of vehicle mechanics.

title: Frontend Engineer | Senior | Muse Squad
description_text:
The Frontend team ensures that the website's visual and functional elements deliver exceptional performance while aligning with business goals. We focus on creating outstanding user experiences through UI/UX excellence, personalized content delivery, and seamless performance. By adopting headless architecture, we develop scalable solutions that power content across multiple platforms and devices, ensuring flexibility and future-proofing our technology.

Join our dynamic MUSE team as a Frontend Engineer and help shape the future of password management! We're a friendly, cross-functional team of 10 building the B2B side of NordPass, focusing on shared folders, permissions, and the admin panel. You'll design cutting-edge UIs, and collaborate closely with UX and backend experts. If you're passionate about exploring new tech, contributing to strategic solutions, and building innovative proofs-of-concept, we want to hear from you.
\n

Main responsibilities
Collaborate with Product Manager, Engineering Manager, Back-end and Front-end Engineers to build proof of concepts and MVPs.
Solve complex user problems.
Contribute to the team’s technical vision.
Develop and maintain a high-quality code base, including Admin Panel, Desktop, Browser Extension.
Consistently deliver challenging projects on schedule.
Mentor colleagues on web development best practices & provide technical guidance.

Core requirements
5+ years of professional experience in software development.
Proven development experience working with JavaScript/TypeScript.
Deep understanding of the ReactJS.
Familiar with FrontEnd toolset (Vite, etc.).
Advanced in CSS/Scss.
Passion for building clean and tested code.
Knowledge of web development, testing, and performance optimization best practices.
Proven experience in developing high-quality and high-performance front-end web applications.
Team spirit, proactiveness, and ability to work in a fast-paced environment.

Bonus Points For
Knowledge of cryptography and security principles
Experience working with Electron

Salary range
24 000 - 33 400 PLN/month gross on the Employment Contract

\n
About Us Nord Security is a global leader in internet privacy and security solutions and Lithuania’s second tech unicorn. Established in 2012, Nord Security now has more than 1400 employees and serves millions of users worldwide. Our team has a global mission to shape a more secure and peaceful online future for people everywhere. With that in mind, we built several advanced cybersecurity solutions: NordVPN, NordLayer, NordLocker, NordPass, NordProtect, NordStellar, and Saily. At NordPass we are working on showing that cybersecurity can be simple and easy for everyone. We take care of the security so that our users could do their best online effortlessly. And yes, being on people’s side and working against cybercrimes feel good! NordPass is an intuitive password manager for both business and consumer clients. It’s powered by the latest technology for the utmost security. Developed with affordability, simplicity, and ease-of-use in mind, NordPass allows users to access passwords securely on desktop, mobile, and browsers. It generates and remembers complex passwords, auto-fills logins and online forms and lets you access it all from anywhere. With NordPass you can share logins with peers and check if your accounts were breached. All passwords are encrypted on the device, so only the user can access them. NordPass was created by the experts behind NordVPN — the advanced security and privacy app trusted by more than 14 million customers worldwide. And we’re always looking to expand our team of: • Future shapers • Restless achievers • Self-movers • Honest communicators • Team players What We Offer • Access to Nord Security products. We build solutions used by millions of users worldwide, and you’ll get to experience our products firsthand; • Professional growth. Internal and external events, online training, conferences, books - everything you need to reach full potential; • Health benefits. Private health insurance, online and on-site workouts, consultations to feel and be your best; • Mental wellbeing. Access to mental health tools like Calm, Headspace, and Mindletic. Options for therapy to keep your emotional wellbeing in check; • Team spirit. Team buildings and parties with games, shows, tastings, food coupons, gifts, and it’s on us; • More free time. Stay with us and additional vacation days will be added to your calendar; • Additional paid leave. Additional days are covered by us in cases of illness or special occasions; • Flexibility. Flexible working time arrangement. linkedin_org_description:
Nord Security is one of the world’s leading providers of digital security and privacy solutions for businesses and individuals. 

We are a home for advanced security solutions that share the Nord brand and values. Today, our products are used by millions of customers worldwide and praised by all the major cybersecurity experts and top media outlets.

Since 2012, we have been creating and building award-winning products: 

NordVPN - the fastest VPN on the planet, built to protect your online traffic and privacy with next-generation encryption.

NordLayer - an adaptive network access security solution for modern businesses, helping organizations to fulfill scaling and integration challenges. 

NordPass - a password manager designed with the user in mind, from simplicity to security. Built using zero-knowledge encryption.

NordStellar - a threat exposure management solution that enables you to detect and respond to cyber threats targeting your company — before they escalate.

NordLocker - a powerful end-to-end encryption tool for safely storing and sharing files. Comes with secure cloud storage.

Saily - a global eSIM service that cuts costs, saves time, and helps travelers stay connected around the world.

Our community of cybersecurity experts, software developers, engineers, data analysts, and other tech professionals share one common goal – create a safe cyber future for everyone.

title: Marketing Communications Manager
description_text:
About the Team
At Trendyol Growth, we align pricing, discount, and marketing strategies to drive sustainable and scalable growth. We work cross-functionally with teams like Product, Category, and Operations to uncover opportunities and deliver impact. With a strong learning culture and data-driven mindset, we grow together — as individuals and as a team.

We are seeking a strategic and highly experienced Marketing Communications Manager to lead our brand, content, and communication efforts across the Gulf region. In this role, you will define the brand strategy and orchestrate the execution of the annual marketing calendar, ensuring a consistent and impactful message across all channels. Acting as a central link between cross-functional teams and external agencies, you will leverage market opportunities and data-driven insights to elevate the customer experience and drive business growth in an international setting.
\n

Responsibilities
Responsible for brand marketing, content creation, and communication efforts within the Gulf Region.
Establish a strong communication link between the marketing department and other teams to enhance customer experience.
Work closely with all relevant marketing teams (media, digital, influencer, CRM, creative) to ensure consistency of the brand message in every channel.
Help set the style, tone, and language of content by analyzing existing data and watching regional competitors.
Set the brand strategy and orchestrate the execution of the annual marketing calendar for defined markets and categories.
Analyze competitors and industry best practices on brand marketing efforts and content creation.
Work closely with creative, media, and event agencies, as well as other third parties, to develop projects and campaigns.
Proactively explore and utilize market opportunities for the benefit of the brand.

Expected Qualifications
Bachelor's or Master’s Degree preferably in Engineering, Management, Economics, or other related departments.
Minimum 10+ years of experience in either FMCG, retail, e-commerce, or fashion sectors, preferably in an international setting.
Proven experience in team management and experience in sponsorships or partnerships in the region.
Data-driven, result-oriented, and an analytical thinker with a high sense of responsibility.
Strong communication skills and a pursuit of creativity with excellent written and verbal English.
Ability to multi-task, prioritize tasks, and coordinate different parties of the projects.
Great initiative taker with the ability to deliver fast, business-focused output of excellent quality.
No restrictions for travelling.

\n
What We Offer
- Hybrid working model with flexibility: a schedule that helps you find the right balance between flexibility and team bonding, including work-from-abroad opportunities and a summer working model.
- Personalised training allowance and learning opportunities: Use your annual budget for any training or conference of your choice, explore our Learning Management System (LMS) anytime, and join in-person learning sessions offered throughout the year.
- Responsibility from day one: Take full ownership from the start in a culture where every voice is heard and valued.
- A diverse, international team: Collaborate with global peers across our offices in Berlin, Amsterdam, Dubai, and beyond, in a startup-spirited and collaborative environment.
- Opportunities to grow with the best: Tackle meaningful challenges, develop through hands-on experience, and grow with the support of expert guidance and global mentoring.
- Meaningful connections beyond tasks: Be part of team rituals, events, and social activities that help us stay connected and inspired.

Take the Next Step
If this role excites you, apply today, we look forward to taking the next step with you.
Want to get to know the team better first? Explore our Career Website, LinkedIn, or YouTube to learn more about #LifeatTrendyol and how we work.

We were founded in 2010 with a dynamic and agile start-up spirit. Since then, we have grown into a decacorn, backed by Alibaba, General Atlantic, Softbank, Princeville Capital, and several sovereign wealth funds.

We believe that technology is the driver; e-commerce is the outcome. Thanks to our dedicated team, we are one of the top five e-commerce companies in EMEA and one of the fastest-growing e-commerce companies in the world! 

We deliver more than 2.5 million packages every day across 35 countries. We offer our 40 million customers a flawless shopping experience.

As a dynamic and passionate company, we are constantly growing with Trendyol Tech, one of the top R&D centres; Trendyol Express, the fastest growing delivery network; Dolap, the largest second-hand goods platform.

And we’re not done yet! Now, we are on a journey to expand the positive impact we create to international markets. After kicking off our expansion in Europe in 2021, we entered Azerbaijan and the Gulf region in 2023, and most recently launched in Central and Eastern Europe in 2024.

title: Driver / Data Collector in Erfurt, Germany
description_text:
Unternehmensbeschreibung
Die Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) ist ein Unternehmen für Felddatenerhebung, das 2017 in Europa gegründet wurde. Wir erfassen Daten dort, wo Automatisierung nicht möglich ist. Wir zählen Merkmale, machen Fotos und Videos, zeichnen Sprache auf und scannen Gebiete bis ins kleinste Detail – damit Sie fundiertere Entscheidungen treffen können. Unsere Teams zur Datenerhebung sind in Europa und Nordamerika im Einsatz und bereit, sich neuen Herausforderungen zu stellen.

Projektübersicht
Ziel dieses Projekts ist es, hochwertige visuelle Aufnahmen von Straßen, wichtigen Sehenswürdigkeiten und öffentlichen Bereichen in verschiedenen EU-Ländern zu erfassen. Mithilfe von Fahrzeugen, die mit abnehmbaren 360°-Kameras und Lidar-Systemen ausgestattet sind, nehmen die Fahrer umfassende Bilder ihrer Umgebung auf. Die erfassten Daten werden auf bordeigenen Computern (SSD-Laufwerken) gespeichert und später zur Verbesserung einer der führenden Online-Kartenplattformen verwendet.

Die Datensammler folgen vorgegebenen Routen, die sich auf öffentliche Straßen, Geschäftsviertel und Sehenswürdigkeiten konzentrieren. Um die bestmögliche Bildqualität zu gewährleisten, müssen bestimmte Bereiche möglicherweise bei günstigen Wetterbedingungen erneut besucht werden.
Die Projektdauer variiert je nach Umfang der Datenerhebung im jeweiligen Zielgebiet. In der Regel umfasst der Einsatz eine aktive Arbeitsphase von 3 bis 6 Monaten.

Arbeitszeit:
Vollzeitbeschäftigung innerhalb der regulären Geschäftszeiten (8:00–19:00 Uhr).

Ablauf des Bewerbungsverfahrens:
Fahrprüfung zur Verkehrssicherheit, Interview mit einem Recruiter sowie anschließender Onboarding-Prozess.
\n

Ideale/r Kandidat/in:
Gültiger EU-Führerschein
Einwandfreier Leumund (polizeiliches Führungszeugnis und Fahreignungsnachweis)
Mindestens 5 Jahre Fahrpraxis
Berufserfahrung als Fahrer (z. B. Taxi, Kurier, Logistik)
Gute Englischkenntnisse und Beherrschung der Landessprache
Technisch versiert, Erfahrung mit GSuite (Gmail, Google Tabellen, Google Formulare)
Grundkenntnisse in Fahrzeugmechanik
Verantwortungsbewusst, zuverlässig und professionell
Reiselust und Freude am Entdecken neuer Orte
Gute Ortskenntnisse im Einsatzgebiet

Wir bieten:
Ein abwechslungsreiches und spannendes Projekt – mehr als nur Fahren
Wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung
Umfassende Schulung (praktisch und theoretisch)
Laufende Unterstützung durch erfahrene Projektleiter
Arbeit in einem internationalen Team und Umfeld

\n
Wenn Sie Interesse haben, bewerben Sie sich jetzt und gestalten Sie mit uns die Zukunft der Datenerhebung!

title: Driver / Data Collector in Aachen, Germany
description_text:
Company description

Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges.


Project Overview

This project aims to collect high-quality visuals of streets, key points of interest, and public spaces across EU countries. Using vehicles equipped with removable 360° cameras and lidars, drivers will capture comprehensive images of the surroundings. The captured data will be stored on onboard computers (SSD Drives) and later utilized to enhance one of the world’s leading online mapping platforms.

Data collectors will follow pre-assigned routes, focusing on public streets, commercial areas, and points of interest. To ensure the highest image quality, certain areas may need to be revisited during favorable weather conditions. 
The duration of the project varies based on the scope of work required in each targeted data collection area. On average, the assignments involve 3 to 6 months of active work.

Work schedule: full time engagement within standard business hours (8 AM - 7 PM).

The recruitment process for the position of a Driver involves such steps: safety driving test, interview with recruiter, and onboarding process.
\n

Ideal Candidate:
Holds a valid EU-issued driver’s license.
Maintains a clean background check (criminal and driving record).
Has at least 5 years of driving experience.
Possesses professional driving experience (e.g., taxi, delivery, logistics).
Proficient in English and the local language.
Tech-savvy, with experience using GSuite tools (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms).
Basic knowledge of vehicle mechanics.
Demonstrates responsibility, reliability, and professionalism.
Enjoys traveling and exploring new places.
Familiar with the area of operations.

What We Offer:
A dynamic and engaging project that goes beyond just driving.
Competitive salary.
Comprehensive training covering both practical and theoretical aspects of data collection.
Ongoing support from experienced managers.
The opportunity to work in an international team and environment.

\n
If you’re interested, apply now and join us in shaping the future of data collection!

title: Conducteur / Collecteur de données à Nîmes, France
description_text:
Description de l'entreprise 
Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) est une entreprise spécialisée dans la collecte de données sur le terrain, fondée en 2017 en Europe. Nous collectons des données là où l’automatisation est impossible. Nous comptons les caractéristiques, prenons des photos, réalisons des vidéos, enregistrons des voix et scannons des zones pour vous fournir tous les détails nécessaires à une prise de décision éclairée. Nos équipes de collecte de données sur le terrain sont réparties à travers l’Europe et l’Amérique du Nord, prêtes à accepter de nouveaux défis. 

Objectif du projet
L'objectif du projet est de collecter des images de haute qualité de rues, de points d’intérêt clés et d’espaces publics dans tous les pays de l’UE. À l’aide de véhicules équipés de caméras amovibles à 360° et de lidars, les conducteurs captureront des images complètes des environs. Les données collectées seront stockées sur des ordinateurs de bord (disques SSD) et utilisées plus tard pour améliorer l'une des cartes en ligne les plus populaires au monde.
Les collecteurs de données suivent des itinéraires prédéfinis, en se concentrant sur les rues publiques, les zones commerciales et les points d’intérêt. Pour assurer la meilleure qualité d’image, certaines zones devront être revisitées lors de conditions météorologiques favorables.
La durée du projet varie en fonction de l’étendue des travaux requis dans chaque zone ciblé de collecte de données. En moyenne, les missions impliquent de 3 à 6 mois de travail actif.

Horaire de travail: engagement à temps plein dans les heures normales d’ouverture (de 8 h - à 19 h)
Le processus de recrutement pour le poste de conducteur comprend les étapes suivantes : un test de conduite sécuritaire, un entretien avec un recruteur et un processus d’intégration.
\n

Candidat idéal:
Possède un permis de conduire valide délivré dans l’UE.
Dispose d’un casier judiciaire et d’un dossier de conduite vierges.
Justifie d’au moins 5 ans d’expérience de conduite.
Possède une expérience professionnelle en conduite (p. ex.: taxi, livraison, logistique)
Maîtrise l’anglais et la langue locale.
À l’aise avec les outils technologiques, notamment la suite GSuite (Gmail, Google Sheets, Google Forms).
Connaissances de base en mécanique automobile.
Fait preuve de responsabilité, de fiabilité et de professionnalisme.
Apprécie les voyages et la découverte de nouveaux endroits.
Connaît bien la région d’opérations.

Nous offrons:
Un projet dynamique et engageant qui va bien au-delà de la simple conduite.
Un salaire compétitif.
Une formation complète couvrant les aspects pratiques et théoriques de la collecte de données.
Un soutien continu de la part de managers expérimentés.
La possibilité de travailler dans une équipe et un environnement international.

\n
