title: Seller Experience Operations Professional
description_text:
ABOUT THE TEAM

Trendyol Go, originally founded as the instant delivery arm of Trendyol, one of Turkey’s leading e-commerce platforms, was acquired by Uber to join forces in accelerating the future of local commerce and on-demand delivery. Born from a dynamic startup spirit and backed by Trendyol, Trendyol Go connects local merchants, couriers, and customers in real time to meet everyday needs with speed and reliability. 

Our on-demand platform offers instant delivery for food, groceries, and more bringing convenience and choice right to the doorsteps of millions. As part of Uber, the world’s largest mobility and delivery technology platform, we combine local market expertise with cutting-edge technology to redefine urban delivery. 

We are committed to powering seamless experiences that enable customers to get what they want, when they want it, while creating flexible earning opportunities for couriers. With a mission to strengthen local commerce and foster positive impact on merchants and couriers, Trendyol Go is evolving rapidly expanding its offerings and reach, innovating with technology, and delivering exceptional service every step of the way.
\n

YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES 
Develop deep expertise in on-demand delivery
Manage multiple vendors with large operations teams across multiple locations
Monitor daily customer operations, respond to questions, and solve problems rapidly
Build and manage high-performing operations teams through close KPI monitoring
Keep up with industry developments, develop best practices, and implement them directly
Conduct regular site visits to understand operational needs

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR
Minimum 5 years of experience in customer support operations
University degree, preferably in Engineering, Economics, or Management
Customer-centric and KPI-driven mindset
Ability to generate and analyze data to improve speed, quality, efficiency, and effectiveness of the customer support team
Experience working in dynamic environments with a data-driven approach
Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work with multiple stakeholders and vendors


\n
JOIN US AND
* Take ownership from day one and grow your skills in a collaborative, international environment. 
* Experience a start-up spirit with the stability of a large tech company. 
* Tackle impactful challenges in local commerce using agile practices. 
* Be part of a creative, focused team that values collaboration and results. 
* Access a rich learning platform for ongoing personal and professional development. 
* Work with global experts, supported by mentoring and upskilling opportunities. 
* Advance based on talent and impact — not just job titles. 
* Stay connected through engaging team events, meetings, and social activities. 
* Enjoy top-tier benefits.
* Balance flexibility and team bonding through our hybrid work model, including the summer model to work remotely opportunity 

We look forward to your application! We operate on a hybrid model, combining the efficiency of remote work with the collaboration of in-person teamwork. Teams come together on designated days to foster creativity and connection.Note: Hybrid work applies only to hybrid roles. Some positions may require regular on-site presence.
ai_core_responsibilities: The main responsibilities include developing expertise in on-demand delivery and managing multiple vendors across various locations. Additionally, the role involves monitoring daily operations and building high-performing teams through KPI tracking.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a minimum of 5 years of experience in customer support operations and a university degree, preferably in Engineering, Economics, or Management. A customer-centric mindset and the ability to analyze data for operational improvements are also required.

We were founded in 2010 with a dynamic and agile start-up spirit. Since then, we have grown into a decacorn, backed by Alibaba, General Atlantic, Softbank, Princeville Capital, and several sovereign wealth funds.

We believe that technology is the driver; e-commerce is the outcome. Thanks to our dedicated team, we are one of the top five e-commerce companies in EMEA and one of the fastest-growing e-commerce companies in the world! 

We deliver more than 2.5 million packages every day across 35 countries. We offer our 40 million customers a flawless shopping experience.

Dreaming big is in our DNA: We're gearing up to be the leading global e-commerce platform. As a dynamic and passionate company, we are constantly growing with Trendyol Tech, one of the top R&D centres; Trendyol Express, the fastest growing delivery network; Dolap, the largest second-hand goods platform.

And we’re not done yet! Now, we are on a journey to expand the positive impact we create to international markets. After kicking off our expansion in Europe in 2021, we entered Azerbaijan and the Gulf region in 2023, and most recently launched in Central and Eastern Europe in 2024.

title: [Job-26222] Senior Data Engineer (Migrations), Brazil
description_text:
We are tech transformation specialists, uniting human expertise with AI to create scalable tech solutions.
With over 8,000 CI&Ters around the world, we’ve built partnerships with more than 1,000 clients during our 30 years of history. Artificial Intelligence is our reality.

Objective:
We are looking for adaptable and hands on Data Engineers to help our client migrate various domains of business data to their new strategic data platform. This will primarily involve the migration of data from the current data platform to a newly built Snowflake solution. It will also involve supporting development teams as they evolve the data and event models of business applications to integrate with the new technology, to yield new insights and data products, and a new generation of AI applications running successfully on data you’ve helped generate.

Key Activities
In collaboration with data analysts and developers, work alongside business domain teams to clean, transform and migrate their data from the current data platform to a new strategic data platform built around Snowflake.
Integrate data pipeline, ETL and event capture capabilities with business domain applications to ensure new data flows to the target platform. Develop and implement data pipelines for the collection and ingestion of information from various sources.
Be a liaison between the data team and the business domain team you will support
Support the iterative rollout and testing of key self serve data and analytics use cases to business domain stakeholders
Participate in the definition and implementation of scalable and robust data architectures, that can be utilised to deliver AI enabled business solutions. Support onward initiatives to develop generative AI use cases against the migrated data, and further iterative evolution of strategic data products and services
Develop solutions for data governance and organization, ensuring compliance with security and privacy policies.
Implement data transformation processes to enable advanced analysis and generation of insights.
At position map level 4, you can assist in team management by providing guidance, support, and direction for the development of activities and careers.

Core skills
Hands-on experience on at least one major data migration project (6+ mo)
Experience running data discovery exercises and mapping potential business data models and events to data platform capabilities 
Experience using Fivetran for ELT, CDC
Experience with Snowplow, Snowflake, dbt modeling
Familiarity with Mixpanel, Tableau
Familiarity with cloud native environments
Strong technical communication skills in English
